If you intend to watch this TV often, I would suggest investing in a nice inexpensive pair of computer speakers....but this may not be necessary for casual viewing of news or weather channels. I would have liked a USB port or memory card slot for viewing pics, etc., but all in all I am very happy with my purchase. Nice that it has a full-function remote too!
This novela was charming! A sweet story of love, with likable characters and a great sense of humor. I laughed out loud several times. I am looking forward to reading Jen's other books!
Fit exactly like I hoped, not too cropped, not too long. The fabric is way softer than I expected and pairs perfectly with high-waisted jeans. Obsessed.

I picked this up hoping for a steamy f/f romance, but it's really more of an emotional character study. The chemistry between the two leads is obvious, and the author writes their internal struggles really well. Just don't expect much spice on the page. I'd recommend this to readers who like slow-burn, feelings-heavy stories over explicit scenes. It was a decent afternoon read but probably won't stick with me long-term. Three stars for solid writing but not quite my thing.
Loved the quick shipping and solid packaging. Got it fast and looked great upon arrival, definitely a watchpiece!

Arrived two days earlier than expected, which was a nice surprise. Packaging was solid, no bending or damage at all, and the hardware came separated into a clear little baggie so nothing was rattling around loose. First impression out of the box: this thing is surprisingly thin and lightweight. Honestly wasn't sure it would handle the floating shelf I planned to hang, but figured I'd give it a shot. The finish is clean with no rough edges, and they include a decent little bubble level already attached. Haven't fully load-tested it yet but mounting it to studs was straightforward with the predrilled slots. Knocking off one star because the included screws feel a bit cheap and I'll probably swap them out. Overall though, solid value so far.

I finally picked this up after years of hearing the hype, and honestly I was a little worried it wouldn't live up to it. It absolutely did. The writing just pulls you straight into Scarlett's world in a way I didn't expect, raw, messy, and so vivid. I'd only known the basic plot from cultural references, but experiencing the actual depth of her stubbornness and survival firsthand was something else. Mitchell doesn't flinch from showing how war reshapes everyone, and I found myself genuinely stunned by how relevant the emotional beats still feel. If you're on the fence about such a long read, don't be, it earns every page.

Unbelievable! This was such a rare car, and I thought it would be cool. But no, soon after I bought it, the tow cable came off, and the paint on the windshield got scratched off. Not recommending this to anybody!!
Holds some gift wrap but not longer tubes which is disappointing.

I bought one of these for my Marineland Heartland 60 Gallon tank (essentially a tall 55 Gallon at 24" high) with a center brace; a perfect fit, so I'm buying a second! 4/5 because the glass edge was very slightly chipped on one small section, but not enough to warrant a return. Also, the outer shipping box was not the best in the world...soaked and crushed by FedEx. Thankfully, the canopy itself was unharmed. I've no idea why some people are finding it difficult to attach the backstrip, unless it's just down to manufacturing variations. Mine slid straight on with no issues.

I picked this up for my ten-year-old who blows through books like nobody's business, and she was hooked from the first chapter. The story has this creepy, dreamlike quality that kept her completely absorbed for three straight days. She kept coming to find me just to read passages out loud, which is always a good sign. Honestly, I ended up reading it myself after she finished, and I can see why she liked it so much. The illustrations scattered throughout are a nice touch too. My only minor complaint is that the middle section drags just a tiny bit before picking back up. Still, for a kid who's already exhausted everything else in that age range, this is a solid pick. We'll definitely be checking out more from this author.
What is not to love about a tennis ball that squeaks? If you ask our dogs, the answer will be "nothing!!
Again it just goes to prove once in true love ever a divorce can't stop what God wants for both of them.

Expected these to fit like my usual Cherokee pair but the cut runs big on me. The material feels thinner than anticipated too. They're okay for the price and will do for work, but I'll be trying a different style next time.

The "polish" already shows lots of scratches, though I can not tell if it is that or the steel itself. The thick glass lids are very good, and they actually can match other pans and visa versa. There's very little problem with food sticking after light use. Three Stars because there is evidence of being stained from the electric stove, so they are not in fact "stainless" as suggested.

This is a good beginning textbook. It is still being used in an online college where I tutor even though there are several more recent editions. I actually now have 3 different editions for different colleges and find them mostly the same. Certainly if you want a book for personal use, this a bargain.

I was really disappointed with this toy. It looks so tiny, only about an inch long, and i worried it would be a choking hazard for my little sister. The instructions were clear but the packaging felt flimsy, and after using it, the paper came right away. Not what I expected from such a simple design. Wouldn't recommend unless you have a specific need for something so small.

For what this costs, I expected a lot better performance. The motor struggles with anything thicker than standard ceramic, and the water pump gave out after maybe six months of weekend use. Replacement parts aren't cheap either, so the "value" argument falls apart pretty quick. The table itself is flimsy and flexes when you're trying to guide larger tiles through, which means crooked cuts no matter how careful you are. I've rigged up some shims to stabilize it, but honestly, you shouldn't have to do that on something at this price point. It'll do for small bathroom repairs if you're patient, but for any real tiling project, save your money and step up to something better built. The fence system is also a joke and won't hold true.
Love the M9, but cheap plastic and broke off easily for the use of 1 hour. Still have the magazine for the remembrance of my M9.
Great book. The character development is exceptional. The ending was a little drawn out, but I understand why. Awesome trilogy.
This product is sturdy and has a nice design. Will last and last.

I didn't know anything about this movie. Saw that Angelina Jolie directed or produced it - this was a solid and intriguing movie. True story which made it more appealing. There wasn't a lot of violence but it kept you on the edge of your seat. I love happy endings.

I didn't know I needed this until I got one, and now I don't know how I went without it. Such a simple tool that makes working on the front end much easier - not to mention cleaning the front wheel! Works perfectly and the price is right.

I wanted to love this set since the ergonomic grip and clean vials look fantastic right out of the box. Unfortunately, the 24-inch one showed a consistent half-bubble drift when I flipped it end-for-end on my workbench. The other sizes were dead-on, so it feels like a quality control miss rather than a design flaw. It's still usable if you always reference the same orientation, but for the price I expected better accuracy across all three.

My little boy loves prehistoric animals. When I saw this wooly I knew he would be so happy to have it as an addition to his collection. I am happy to report the item is of great quality and very detailed. Happy buyer.

I've been using this spectra line for ridgelines and general tarp setups on backpacking trips, and I'm genuinely impressed by how little stretch it has. Once I tension it, everything stays drum-tight even after a rainy night. The thin diameter is a huge plus for me, it disappears in the pack and doesn't snag on every branch when I'm threading through trees. I was a little worried about knot holding with such slick material, but a simple three-turn fisherman's knot bites down hard and hasn't slipped once. It's also surprisingly abrasion-resistant; after a full season of rubbing against bark, there's barely any fuzz. If bulk has ever annoyed you, this stuff is a total game changer.
Loved it through a few months, held up well and still works great. My kids keep saying it's awesome now that they have multiple sets. Durable quality definitely stands out.

I really loved this vacuum after a long hunt for one that worked on my kitchen tiles and hardwood floors. The bagless design is a big plus, no messy emptying and it felt great right away. The motor was strong, and the filter kept getting clean without any extra hassle. Compared to higher-priced models, it delivers solid performance for the price. I saved money by choosing this one instead of going further up the cost ladder. It's a smart pick if you need a reliable cleaner without breaking the bank. Highly recommend!

Got this for my kid mainly for the mirror feature. The photo quality is pretty mediocre, colors look washed out and shots aren't sharp. She still uses it sometimes but definitely not her favorite accessory. For the price I expected a little better, but I guess it does the bare minimum.
Finally gave in and bought it. Takes all the guess work out. Just remember to store it dialed to lowest torque setting so you don't mess with the spring tension.
Used as gifts, the people I gave them to liked them.
This one was way cheaper than expected. The quality isn't bad but it's not premium either, still a solid deal.
If you have time to try out the ideas and you like details, some sugestions can be helpful and can make your experience on the web more enjoyable.

For the money, this thing is a steal. I wasn't expecting much at this price point, but it actually gets the job done without any drama. The barrel is all metal, which gives it a surprisingly solid feel when you're pumping, and the folding foot peg stays put on pavement. The dual-valve head switches easily between Presta and Schrader without leaking, and I've topped off my road bike tires from flat to rideable in just a couple of minutes. It does get a little warm if you're going for high pressure, but nothing alarming. The mounting bracket that came with it is a bit flimsy, so I just toss the pump in my pannier instead. Overall, you'd be hard-pressed to find something more capable for under twenty bucks.

This is a high quality surge protector for a reasonable price. I trust the APC brand above many other brands, and the high quality of this unit is very apparent when compared with cheaper surge protectors.
The sound is terrible, won't accept it again. Disappointing experience.

Got the box a day earlier than expected, which was a nice surprise. Packaging was no-frills but effective, thick cardboard, dense foam inserts, everything snug and scratch-free. Pulling the rack out, I immediately noticed the heft. It feels overbuilt in the best way, with a clean powder coat and zero sharp edges. The single-bolt hitch attachment is simple, though I did need a breaker bar to get it really tight. First impression mounting it solo was smooth, maybe 20 minutes taking my time. Threw a couple trail bikes on and the anti-wobble design kept things quiet on a quick test loop. Knocking one star only because the instructions could be clearer for first-timers. Otherwise, solid gear.

This system is fine if you are close to it, like the computer or video games, but for entertainment center use, it's just not as great as I was hoping. Sure, certain DVD's are louder, but some I've tried just are not as loud as I'd want with this system. I'd be better off hooking it up to my old component stereo system to get the loudness I want. I admit, the subwoofer puts out good bass, but the main speakers just don't have enough loudness.
Had this on my Kindle for over eight months now, tossed in bags daily. Still looks brand new, no peeling or cracks. Solid protection without adding bulk.
Arrived two days early in solid packaging. Seems decent quality out of the box but haven't tested it yet.
For what you pay, these are a steal. Light, flexible, and feel like barefoot shoes that won't fall apart. Zero regrets.

I absolutely devoured this book. The way Roberts writes the suffocating, sticky heat of the Mississippi bayou is incredible, you can practically feel the humidity clinging to your skin and hear the cicadas buzzing in the background. It's not just a setting, it's a character in itself, adding this thick layer of tension to every single scene. The romance between Caroline and Tucker has real, slow-burn chemistry that felt earned, not rushed. But honestly, the murder mystery is what kept me up way past midnight. I genuinely didn't guess the killer until the final reveal, and the last few chapters had my heart pounding. Perfect blend of suspense and steamy, small-town atmosphere. Easily one of her best standalones.
We got it for the Dory Story but we really liked the Octopus!!! There will likely be more spin off from this one!
good product fast shipping no problem with my order I'm happy with my purchase.

Ordered this kickstand late on a Sunday and it showed up by Wednesday in a sturdy little box with proper foam padding around the hardware. No bent metal or scratched finish like I've dealt with on other cheap bike parts. Pulled it out and was genuinely surprised by how solid it feels, the alloy has a clean anodized coating and the mounting bracket is thick, not flimsy stamped tin. Everything I needed was in the bag including an extra bolt. Haven't ridden with it yet but initial fitment on my Trek frame was perfect and the folding mechanism snaps firm. For the price, this is way better than I expected. Will update if anything changes.
Great value for the price, though the scent is a bit off. Overall solid experience.
The double-wall insulation keeps my water icy cold through an entire day of hiking, even in direct sun. I've never had a bottle hold temperature this well. Super impressed with the performance.

The packaging was super neat and the item arrived fresh, exactly what I expected. Right off the box, it felt special, and the story truly resonated with me. Highly recommend for anyone into romance novels!

I just got these candles and right away I was impressed by how well they packed, super neat boxes with high-quality paper. The vanilla scent is subtle but lovely, perfect for a cozy room. Though the burn time is short, the look alone made my space feel festive. Great value and thoughtful presentation!

This is a slim case designed for all models of the iPad mini. The mini snaps into the pressure fit back and has magnetic three-section lid that turns the iPad of and on automatically. Good case with good value.
Mitch is an awesome writer..This book kept me reading till the end..was hard to put down..
This had a lot of good tips and basic information on how to survive, was a good little book that I enjoyed very much

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing seriously overdelivers. Ice lasts a full workday even sitting in a hot truck. My old Yeti barely made it four hours. Fits a cup holder perfectly and the lid hasn't leaked once. Way better than I anticipated and I already ordered a second one for my wife.

I wish the music played continually instead of turning off after one song as my son hasn't mastered hitting the button for another song. Regardless, its a good distraction in the car for him and the two volume settings are nice

Picked this up on a whim and honestly glad I did. The real selling point for me is the print quality on a few of these titles, way sharper than I expected for largely forgotten studio pictures. A couple look a little soft, sure, but most are surprisingly clean with solid contrast. The audio could use a boost in spots since I had to crank my volume on one of the features. Still, for the price you're getting a pretty neat lineup of lesser-known gems worth checking out.

I tried this new dock and it actually performed better than expected, what a relief! The build quality is solid and feels good in my hands, which I noticed compared to some cheaper options out there. But here's the catch: the door flap didn't hold up when I tried to swap drives. It snagged on its own, which was disappointing. Still, if you value durability and a nice look, it's worth the price. Just be careful during removal or installation. Overall, a decent pick but not perfect.

I'm commenting here only about a belated experience to remark about the resiliency of this unit to water. In an attempt to move my jacket out of the way in boarding a kayak in fresh water (Rainbow River, Fl), one of the pockets of the gore-tex jacket accidentally hung out of the craft (unbeknowngs to me) when my partner sitting behind me said "one of your pockets is in the water". Yep, it had the Canon camera in it; it had been submerged inside the pocket for about a full minute (perhaps longer), but the pocket hadn't pooled with water, only was wet inside. Needless to say, it appeared to be a goner. The viewfinder had beads of water inside, and the screen inside showed condensation and water droplets. Also, the battery compartment had some water in it, but not pooled, but enough that I could pour out several drops from it. I removed the batteries, and over a period of about 60 hours, exposed the camera to sunlight on the dashboard and inside the glove compartment to dry out. It gradually dissapated the droplets inside the viewfinder, and the condensation from the inside screen disappeared. Only at that time did I attempt to turn it on. I couldn't believe it! The 4GB SD card was intact with the pics, and the motor successfully retracted the lens. A few trial pics confirmed that the camera is now back in working order. Call it luck, but patience prevailed in letting natural sunlight and warmth bring it back to life. I'm impressed with this experience.

With 1 large dog and 3 little ones, I have to keep up with the back yard. This is the best item I have found. Easy to use, handles the 'larger' situations very well. I wouldn't order a smaller one, this is the most logical purchase.

I really liked this book and found it to be a solid read. The story kept me hooked from start to finish, with some surprising twists that made it more exciting. The characters were well-developed and added a lot of warmth to the plot. I appreciated how it balanced suspense with lighthearted moments, making it enjoyable without feeling heavy. It was a fun way to pass time while still getting some reading in. The pacing was good, though a few scenes felt a bit rushed. Overall, a satisfying experience that kept me entertained for hours.
If you are buying Def Tech speakers, do yourself a favor and splurge on these brackets. They make installating quick, easy, and secure.

The box arrived looking like somebody had already opened it and shoved it back in. Tape halfway peeled off, no seal, and the little carrying pouch was just loose inside rattling around. Honestly expected better for the price point. Pulled the earbuds out and the whole thing just screams cheap. The wire feels stiff and rubbery, like those gas station ones from years ago. The plug sticks straight out instead of having that bent angle, which is gonna put constant pressure on the connection every time my phone is in my pocket. Haven't even tested sound yet and already thinking about returning. Between the sketchy packaging and the dated build, not feeling great about this lasting more than a couple months. Should've listened to the reviews.

Got sucked into this one over a weekend and honestly glad I did. The production values are top notch and the cast really sells the gothic atmosphere. My only gripe is the pacing gets a little muddy around the middle stretch where it feels like they're stretching material to fill episodes. That said the final two episodes pulled everything together in a way I didn't see coming. Definitely worth the watch if you like slow burn horror.

I got this book right after ordering, it arrived in a box that looked like it was meant for something bigger than a book. The packaging felt shaky and didn't match the price, which made me feel like I wasn't getting my money's worth. When I opened it, the pages were a bit crumpled, and there were a few missing spots. That first impression was off, so even though the content was okay, I'm really disappointed with this shipping experience. Hope the seller improves on that next time.
Pretty neat little things. Going to put one in each vehicle for emergencies. The strobe feature is great.

I went in expecting another quick, formulaic Pride and Prejudice spin-off, but this one surprised me with how fleshed-out the alternate storyline felt. Darcy and Elizabeth still shine, and the pacing keeps things engaging. My only real gripe is that just as I got fully invested, it ended sooner than I would've liked. Still, it's a satisfying read that respects Austen's characters while trying something fresh.

I thought these were going to Stretch like my other 505's and while they do slightly stretch they are not nearly as comfortable as my store bought versions. I can barely raise my leg to a 70 degree angle. My other 505's will let me bring my knee to my chest.

Got about halfway through before I started skimming just to finish the thing. The writing style gets old fast, it's like the author fell in love with his own voice and forgot to write an actual story. Some of the observations about bureaucracy and war are genuinely funny, I'll give it that. But the non-linear timeline and repetitive dialogue gimmicks that were probably fresh sixty years ago just feel exhausting now. I'd honestly only recommend this to English teachers, literature students who are forced to read it, or that one friend who insists everything classic is automatically brilliant. If you're a casual reader looking for an entertaining war satire, there are way better options out there that won't make you feel like you're doing homework.

I was looking for a nice casual dress that I could wear for the spring and summer and luckily the opportunity came along to try this one. I likes it so much that I immediately ordered another in red and I might even get another color. The dress fits me perfectly. I ordered mine in 3X. When I buy dresses similar to this style from Lane Bryant. I normally get the 18/20 size. The size chart of this dress list the 3X as suitable for 22W/24W. I guessed that the dress might run small... and in my case. I guessed right. I wanted some brighter colors and the teal is really pretty and the red is a very bright and vibrant. I like how light weight it is. It's very thin and that will keep me nice and cool especially in the summer heat. It's machine washable so I don't have to worry about a dry cleaning bill. You can add a scarf or nice jacket to jazz it up for the fall you could even add leggings and/or a long sleeved shirt underneath for wearing it in cooler weather. The only drawback is that the V-Neck plunges a bit too much, so I'll have to always wear a tank top underneath to keep my bra from showing. It's not too long either. It falls right above the top of my feet, so I can wear it with sandals or heels. I'm extremely happy with this garment and highly recommend it. Really enjoyed how the recipes were woven right into the plot, made the whole thing feel authentic. Wish the ending hadn't been so rushed though. Still, a solid pick for anyone who loves historical fiction with a culinary twist.
This one really exceeded what I expected. It's smooth and quick, perfect for on-the-go use without cluttering my space. Highly recommended!

After reading every review on deep fryers I could find, I finally decided on this one. It has been great and I couldn't ask for anything better or more easy to use. I put it on my cooktop and let my big hood suck away any odors. It heats up quickly and the food has always come out great. We made donuts after cooking shrimp and halibut with no cross-odors or tastes! My family only tolerates fish, so this was greatly appreciated. Cleanup is easy also. After waiting for the oil to cool, the pan, lid and rack can go into the dishwasher. Only the heating element has to be cleaned by hand and it is quite easy. The oil can be used many times without problems and so it is more economical to use than I originally thought it would be. I would recommend this with no caveats.
I like this harmonica over others like it because I can clean it easily between uses.

Bowl arrived in a box that looked like it got drop-kicked across the warehouse. There was zero padding inside, just the waterer rattling around loose with the power cord. The plastic dome already had a crack running down the side before I even took it out. Called the number on the instruction sheet and nobody picked up after two days of trying. Sent an email too, still nothing. I wasn't about to fill this thing with water and watch it leak all over my kitchen floor so back it goes. Really disappointing because I'd heard decent things about this brand. Save yourself the headache and just go to a pet store and buy one in person so you can actually see what you're getting. Don't waste your time ordering online.

For the price this is honestly a solid buy. Build quality is decent and it pairs fine with my GoPro 11. The screen is bright enough for outdoor framing and getting shots lined up, which is mainly what I bought it for. Just know there's noticeable delay in the feed, so tracking fast motion is pretty frustrating. Overall though, can't complain too much given what it costs compared to name brand monitors.

I really like this new blender model, it's built to last. After a few months of daily use, it still functions smoothly without any issues. The build quality is solid, and I've had no problems with overheating or leaks. What impressed me most was how well it handled tough tasks, which makes it feel like a real workhorse. Even after washing it regularly, everything stays clean and runs efficiently. If you're on the budget but want something dependable, this one checks all the boxes. Great value and quality for its price!

It's been a while since I've finished a book by Ian McEwan feeling more than satisfied, probably not since On Chesil Beach. From 1997-2001 it seemed he couldn't miss. Then came a few rocky bumps including Solar, which was plain awful and stopped me from reading his books. The first 20 or so pages of The Children Act promised to be a return to his heights. I was hoping. He has a knack of writing a gripping opening (notably Enduring Love) and then letting it slip a little... there was so much promise in the opening and then it basically deflated towards the end. He does seem to be predisposed to write about the upper middle class and their emotional problems as they drink fine wines and listen to classical music... alongside the freak-show of the lower classes and their predisposition towards stupidity, violence and slyness. I wonder why I bother while there is a young man, David Mitchell, who is out there with thunder and lightening. McEwan's writing seems a bit dusty and uninteresting in comparison. Still, I give it three stars, as he does have his moments.
Its a fun series very satisfying so go to the beginning and enjoy the books. Not deep but space opera shouldn't
Great quality hooks at a fair price. Perfect for hanging things without breaking the bank.

These things are wonderful! Love them and when I ordered this time around it looks like they received a nice upgrade. Cant beat the warranty either. I recommend this to everyone and will continue to use their products.
If you need a beard for a costume because yours isn't grown in quick enough go this route. Lots and lots of compliments and yes, it does look fake and yes, you'll fool no one, it's a costume!

The second book in the Asylums for Magical Threats series is mesmerizing paranormal romance that takes the reader on an adventure. Fighting to free elemental magic users, Camilla Melini is on a mission to find one of the legendary Four Talents. Marco Alvarez is sent to Mexico with two goals to watch Cams back and to investigate a series of arson fires. Despite their differences they will have to work together to save their colleagues and to keep the Talent from falling into the wrong hands. This steady to fast paced plot keeps readers hovering on the edge of anticipation with suspense, action, drama and romance. The author uses well written scenes and events to inspire vivid images that capture the imagination. Tension building anticipation and curiosity draw the reader deeper into this world of magic and mayhem and the strong compelling characters are easily related and grab the readers attention from the very beginning. The attraction between Cam and Marco radiates from every page and the sex scenes are hot and steamy, but its the relationship that has magic and sparks flying off the pages and the two argue and test each other with snarky and humorous dialogue as well as some fight scenes. The bad guys in this series really inspire outrage and anger, only thing is there are so many plots and conflicts going on, the reader not really sure which ones are the bad guys, which of course keeps things real interesting. The author has created a fascinating world of elemental magic that has surprising twists and turns, intriguing subplots and captivating characters with dazzling abilities that ensure that the reader never gets bored and I was engrossed in this thrilling story from beginning to end and I cant wait to find out what happens next.
nice that you can separate it into two units. I used the 4 only, not enough room on my receiver for the full six. Secured it with a heavy duty double stick Velcro pad.

Put this thing through a full season of travel ball and it still looks new. Stitching held up perfectly, no fraying anywhere. The weight feels solid but never got in the way during games. Definitely built to last.
A quick and fun read. A Classic tale of a mysterious poor girl being rescued by a worldly older man.
For under ten bucks, this soft cover Bible feels way more expensive. The print is clear and it's held up great with daily use.

I am a big Beatles fan but always had mixed feelings about John. He was obviously a great musician and showman. His Imagine album is wonderful, and his plea for peace in the title song is downright anthemic for the peace movement. He truly believed in love; his favorite lyric was "All you need is love." At the same time, for much of his life he was often nastily sarcastic, hotheaded, and abusive, especially when drinking. My understanding of his boyhood before I saw this film was that Lennon liked to exaggerate how difficult his situation had been, separated from his mother and raised by his Aunt Mimi, when in reality he had a very comfortable, secure, middle-class upbringing. I continued to hold this view throughout the film, thinking how good he had it: a reunion with a mother who was fun, doting, and indulgent while being watched over by a strict, but loving, aunt. That is, until the moment when Mimi revealed to him exactly the circumstances of the loss of his father and separation from his mother. Then I got it. And when he finally lost his mother for good, I can see why he described his growing up years as hard. I have much more sympathy for him now.

My senior cat used to hack up furballs almost every morning. After using this paste for about three weeks, the problem has basically disappeared. She actually comes running when I open the tube, which shocked me since she's incredibly picky. The consistency is thick and easy to scoop out, and a little goes a long way. One tube lasts me roughly two months. Wish I'd discovered this stuff years ago.

I've been following this series from the beginning and Adam's story completely lived up to the hype. The way his character has been built throughout the previous books finally pays off here, you really get to see what makes him tick. The chemistry between the leads is off the charts, and the pacing kept me reading well past my bedtime. What I appreciated most was how the author balanced the steamy scenes with actual emotional depth. Adam isn't just a one-note alpha; there are layers there that made me care about what happens to him. The ending sets up the next book perfectly and now I'm genuinely impatient waiting for it. If you've been invested in this series, this installment won't disappoint. Easily one of the stronger entries.

The one's we received had the green light button on the right not the left as pictured. Which turns out is exactly what we wanted. So the picture seems to be mirrored left to right. Works great though. If you plan on using several you might want to make a chart of how you set the four dip switches. When I was testing my handy work I switched the light on and off several times than sat down to rest. The light then began flashing on and off on its own. I was confused until my son came upstairs and told me his light was turning on and off. Only then I realized I set both to the same code accidentally so it was turning on and off both lights.

I went into this completely blind and came out emotionally wrecked in the best way. The pacing is deliberate but every quiet moment builds toward something unforgettable. You can feel the weight of every choice the characters make, and the ending hit me harder than anything has in ages. Genuinely one of those rare movies that stays with you long after the credits roll.

Love this set of clippers. I have used it at least 4 times. It's a great set. Well worth the money I paid and it comes with alot of guards for different hair lengths. Would definitely recommend this product!

Been running in these for about eight months now and they still look practically new. The dial tightening thing holds up way better than regular laces. No fraying, no sole separation, super solid build.

This is a fun and innovative toy that gets kids outside and exploring nature. My 6 year old had so much fun peeking around trees to see what he could find in the woods. He even had fun pretending that he was looking for Big Foot. The handles are very easy to hold, and the periscope is light weight making it easy to bring on a nature walk or hike. My 3 year old even had a blast playing with it. The periscope can be used inside as well to peek behind couches and "spy" on siblings or parents. That makes it a great toy for sunny AND rainy days! I received the periscope from Educational Insights at no charge in exchange for my completely honest review.
Great value at this price point. Worked well with my medium-sized pup.

It holds everything okay, but the plastic feels a bit flimsy.
I love the color selection! Could use a green one though.

While no cat litter is fantastic at least this is organic and does not contain Silica. Clay litter may seem safe however our perfectly healthy 14 year old cat developed a lung condition, like silicosis, which caused from silica in CLAY LITTER. See http://petmac.org/arl/whats-the-big-deal-about-cat-litter/ for more information. Even the "dust free" clay has dust...so 99% dust free compared to what? We have been using the Blue Buffalo cat litter and like it. Yes it has some dust but it is NOT silica AND while it may have a bit of a strong smell when you first put it out, by the second day it is gone. It clumps well, maybe not quite as well as clay but again it is not cancer causing. CDC, OSHA etc ALL have warnings about silica which is in Clay Cat Litter. Personally these manufactures not only do not care about our environment, they do not care about pets because if they did they would not put this poison on the market to hurt animals. Not only did we lose our recent little cat to this but 2 years ago we lost another one to lung cancer. We started doing research and this made perfect sense. Oh, both were big diggers and scratchers in the cat litter thus creating more of the dangerous dust. Please just stay away from ALL clay litters.

This was a gift for my mother in law. She already had a cross necklace she wears, so I saw this angel and decided it was something she would like. Like - no she LOVED it! It is affordable, you get so much for your money. Its beautiful with the white sapphires around the head. It makes it appear to be a halo. It comes packaged very neatly. Great product, great gift!

Esta novela es muy bonita, muy romantica, de muchos sentimientos, mucho amor. Es muy suave de leer, tiene muchos valores como el amor por la familia y tambien tiene sus partes comicas. Megan y Daniel son maravillosos y tambien Brandon. Atrapa desde la primera pagina, la recomiendo mucho.
I ordered this while waiting for a less expensive model to arrive from China. This unit is worth the price difference. Extremely well built. This one will last.

Very lacking to say the least. This was one of our special fav books by Dr Seuss for sure.. This game does need to work together, flexibility, and ability for shapes colors and etc.. After a couple rewatches though, the pacing really drags in the middle, and the low-budget charm wears thin. The disc itself started skipping around the 45-minute mark after maybe five plays, even with careful handling. The content is engaging and the stories are well-researched. A solid choice if you're curious about LDS history. Normally I have good luck with my purchases. I generally do my research and buy well made products. I bought one of these units and used it successfully for six months. During that time it kept my tropical aquarium at a solid 78F. One morning, I went to feed my fish and the water was much warmer than normal. I checked the thermometer and it read 90F, luckily my fish were all still alive. I turned the heater knob down to 70 and allowed the water to cool down on its own. After several hours it held 82. I hadn't done a water change in nearly a week so it's not that I let the water level drop. No big deal, these things happen. Luckily these heaters have a lifetime warranty. I contacted Aqueon by email and received no response. I sent another one a week later, and no response. I couldn't find a phone number for them. Look, sometimes heaters malfunction. A manufacturer can do all they can to prevent it and back it up with a guarantee. But if they don't stand by their own guarantee or even answer your emails, it isn't a crap product; it's a crap company. If you are going to buy an Aqueon heater, I recommend the Aqueon Pro instead of this one. They are better units in my experience. Otherwise, have a look at the Eheim Jager, or Fluval offerings.
The soft, sparkly wings on my daughter's Fairy Daffodil have held up through countless tea parties. She's been dragged everywhere and still looks brand new, no fraying at all.

These are terrific gloves. My go-to glove and far superior to what I'm used to...Pear Izumi. The padding is different but works well for my hand. The pull loops for taking the gloves off is very durable. And of course the price...very affordable.

The jaguar/lion shifter dynamic was way more intense than I expected, and Bowie's persistence didn't come off as pushy, it felt earned. Eva's hesitation made sense, which gave their reunion actual stakes. I was surprised how complete the HEA felt in so few pages. The medieval atmosphere is rich and the central mystery had me hooked for the first half, but the pacing really bogs down in the middle with endless red herrings that don't add much. I also found the lead detective a bit too perfect, always one step ahead in a way that drained some tension. The writing itself is solid, but the author leans on obscure words that pulled me out of the story more than once. Not a bad book, just uneven, and I'm not rushing to grab the next in the series.
I really liked how tough this toy is with my little brother. Keeps up after weeks of play, great value and strong build.

This lens is such a huge improvement over the standard kit lens. When I first acquired my Pentax Kr, I was very happy with the camera as I got back in to photography after being away for 15 years. The Kr is my first digital SLR and I felt that I could achieve great quality pictures without film with a reasonably priced kit. After 18 months, however, I was finding that there was still a quality to my images, particularly of people, that was lacking. At first, I thought it might be the camera. Then, on recommendations from other Pentax users, I decided to give this lens a try. Immediately, my images are sharper, and more colorful than with the standard kit lens. In addition, the larger aperture makes shooting in low light very easy and the bokeh is out of this world. I am very happy with this upgrade. I only wish that Pentax would have made the kit lens a bit better so it would be more useable.
This thing has made bath time way less of a battle. My toddler actually looks forward to rinsing her hair now. The gentle spray pattern is perfect.

I totally loved this extractor set after a tough repair job. It was super easy to use and saved me time without any hassle. The quality is solid, and it really made fixing my old gearbox possible. I especially recommend it if you're short on budget or need a reliable fix quickly. Works great for both cars and tools, definitely worth the investment. Got this for like four bucks on Kindle and honestly it punched way above its weight. The story follows this grad student who ends up trapped in a nightmare when a killer shows up at the house she's visiting. What makes it work is how she doesn't just run, she sneaks into his motorhome to follow him, which had my heart racing the whole time. The villain is genuinely creepy and fleshed out in a way that makes him feel real. I finished it in two sittings because I literally could not put it down. For the price of a coffee, you get a genuinely intense thriller that actually delivers. No filler, no boring stretches, just solid suspense from start to finish. Definitely recommend grabbing a copy.

I received this UPS a couple days ago and found it was fully charged when I received it. This is my first Tripp Lite UPS. I have been a loyal APC user for my entire computing life. I figured I would see if TL is any better. I was surprised that the battery was already hooked up and fully charged when the device arrived. I let it run for two days. First day had no load and second had a minimal load. Tonight I installed the unit in my media center. So far I have had no issues and no smell as reported by others. I currently use this UPS in my media center to keep a TV, sound system, CATV box and DVD running. Current full load is without the DVD and usage is at 37%. With everything turned off, I still see a draw of 9%. The only thing that is slightly annoying, and why I gave this item a 4-star review, is that I cannot figure out how to turn off the LCD display when I did not need it. It is a nice night light in the living room, but I would rather have the display go out automatically or even manually. I read documentation offline and online and found no clues. I sent an email to tech support but haven't heard anything after 3 days. Guess I will call their Chicago phone number and ask. Unfortunately I only remember to call after they close. Otherwise, the unit seems to be solid. Minus the inability to figure out how to turn off the display, I am happy with my purchase. Time will tell if I switch to Tripp Lite, try someone else or go back to APC.

I ordered these for my nephew's party favor bags, expecting something a bit sturdier based on the listing photos. They're noticeably smaller and feel more like cake toppers than actual toys. I've been shooting flintlocks for ages and always dreaded the cleanup ritual until I gave this a try. It cuts through heavy black powder residue almost instantly without needing a bucket of scalding water. A couple of saturated patches followed by a few dry ones and the bore is mirror bright, no scrubbing required. It also leaves a light protective film that seems to keep rust completely at bay between range trips. The lack of harsh chemical smell is a nice bonus too. Honestly wish I had discovered it years ago, it's made my whole shooting routine way more enjoyable.

Brothers who wonder what happened to their closeness, A lonely 10yo boy next door, An attempted suicide, teen dating, etc. I felt like the author had me completely in the world he created.

My teenage daughter wanted to watch it with me. i wouldn't pick it myself. Not my kind of movie.

"First Blood" has to be, without a doubt, one of my favorite action films of all time. I believe that I enjoy it so much because it does a nice job of balancing action scenes with drama. Thus, this film does not reek of the overkill violence that plagues the two sequels (as well as the films of other action stars). Stallone actually does some acting in this film. His performance as a Vietnam Vet come home to find a thankless country is compelling and his emotional breakdown near the end of the film is fantastic. There is a lot of suspense in this film and the characters are certainly memorable. Rambo has a clear enemy in this film, played by Brian Dennehy. He is not taking on the country of Vietnam or the Russians-he is simply defending himself from a small-town cop. My recommendation is to see this film and forget about the two sequels. Of course, any die-hard Rambo fan will tell you that the action sequences only become better as the movies progressed, but they sacrifice much to do this in my opinion. If you enjoy action films with a little class, you'll love "First Blood.

I really loved this pet food, it's a steal compared to similar human brands. The formula is perfect for my dog's needs and the packaging feels solid without breaking the bank. Great value for the price I got it for.

I enjoyed the book. I have reread it several times. Even though, the editing could have been better, the premise and plot of the story was not comprised. Loved the primary characters. The secondary characters added more flair to the story. Cannot wait for Carlo's story. Keep them coming.

Bought this hoping to fix the skipping in my old stereo, but it made zero difference. Ran it twice and the problem's still there. Total waste of money, honestly. Should've just saved up for a new unit.

Fits a large area. Stays in place and I don't have to put holes in my cabinets! It is so nice looing, we just leave it up and keep gate open.

This silicone ring really stood out for me. I was a bit surprised it held up after years of use and daily wear. The most impressive part is how simple it is to clean, it just washes away easily without any fuss. My husband actually likes it so much he doesn't even notice it's there anymore. The comfort feels great, and the fit isn't too tight or loose. It's a practical choice that works for both work and everyday activities. Definitely worth the investment if you're looking for something reliable and easy to maintain.

Didn't expect to get hooked on a show from the 80s, but Murder, She Wrote totally surprised me. The mysteries hold up way better than I thought they would. Angela Lansbury is an absolute treasure.

I am disappointed in these to be honest. I liked them... LOVED them actually. I put them in some sconces I have on my bedroom walls. I've been using this lap desk for a couple weeks now, and it's a total game-changer for working on the couch or in bed. The slim profile slips right into my backpack alongside my laptop, and I barely notice the weight. The surface grips my machine solidly, no sliding around, even when I shift positions. The pull-out mouse tray is sturdy and smooth, perfect for tight spaces. I'd especially recommend this to students or remote workers who bounce between rooms or travel often. If you're someone who hates balancing a hot laptop on your knees, this little thing solves that completely. Great gift idea for anyone who works from home.
This thing totally impressed me, way more performance than expected after rebuilding my rig. The build quality is solid and it fits perfectly in my case. Definitely worth every penny!
My 6 year daughter has been begging me for this for a while!

Such a great tool. Gets in tight spaces with ease. The head of the tool also has a nice magnetic ring that olds the heads of screws firmly in place.
This one really held up through heavy daily use. Worked perfectly and didn't bend or break. Highly recommend!

I will NOT buy anymore FOX shows till seasons 5/6 are released. They did the same with Mary Tyler Moore. SO UNFAIR. Two tv classics. I wish to complete my collection and if you can release 4, you can release 6 seasons......
Look as described, seal great and function as they should. Nothing fancy, but if I drop it on my stove, they won't chip the ceramic flat top...

Honestly I wasn't sure this series could keep up the momentum after book two, but this one completely blew me away. I expected the same formulaic progression but Chelsea's character actually develops in ways I didn't anticipate. Her restlessness between assignments felt so real and relatable, and the Greg storyline caught me off guard in the best way. I've been waiting for his turn since book one and the author did not disappoint. The dynamic between all the partners keeps getting more complex and I love how nothing feels rushed or forced. Way better than I expected for a third installment, usually by now things start getting repetitive but this just keeps raising the stakes. Already dying for book four. If you're on the fence, just keep reading.
Dropped this into my aging laptop and boot times went from two minutes to about fifteen seconds. The DRAM cache really makes a difference with large file transfers. Totally worth it.

I really loved this book! It's a solid read about Lawrence's early work and still holds up well over time. After a few weeks of reading, it still felt fresh and engaging, even after regular use. The writing is clear and the insights remain relevant today. A great purchase if you're into history or military strategy. Worth every moment spent with this one!

My chunky tabby was always begging for food, but this weight care formula has been a game changer. She actually seems satisfied between meals now, and I've noticed her energy creeping back up. Would absolutely recommend this to anyone whose indoor cat needs to slim down without constant hangry meowing. Great stuff.

BEWARE!!!!!! THIS PRODUCT CAN CAUSE YOUR DOG HARM!! I purchased this product because of the great reviews, even though I normally use Frontline. I followed instructions on the weight requirements, as well as where to place the liquid. About an hour after application, my dog started freaking out! He acted like he wanted to jump out of his skin! Running around, stopping, itching, whimpering, acting anxious, etc! I started reading all of the 1-2 star reviews on amazon and was shocked!! Poor dogs having seizures and needing to be hospitalized over this product!! I immediately washed my dog twice with Dawn! Then, gave him some Benadryl to help make him more comfortable! Finally after 45 minutes he was able to sit still and sleep since the Benadryl made him a little drowsy.. The next day he was still acting weird, itchy, uncomfortable etc. DO NOT USE THIS PRODUCT!! Use Frontline! Frontline does not have the ingredient Permethrin, which can be toxic for your dogs! Someone should be suing this company!!

This is a good dog-seat solution. PROS: My 11 pound mini pinscher fits perfectly into it - it is big enough for her to lie down too. The seat can be hung high enough for her to look out the window, or set low (almost on the car seat) for extra stability. The fact that the upper straps are attached to the frame halfway along the side walls and not at the very front means that the full space of the box is available to the dog (i.e. the front wall doesn't cave in). The clip attaches to the god collar or harness and is adjustable in length. The cover is removable and washable. CONS: the frame is metal and the cover very thin, so there is no padding whatsoever if the dog falls against the side of the box or wants to rest her head on the rim. For some strange reason the short strap that clips onto the dog collar/harness is not looped in/permanently attached, i.e. if you try lengthen that strap to the maximum to give your dog more freedom of movement it simply comes out and you have to maneuver it back in. It also came with a HUGE (and I mean huge) clip for attaching to the dog collar/harness, so i had to replace it with a smaller one. TIP: The floor does occasionally tip back, especially if the car seatback to which it is attached is tilted back slightly. The more upright you make the back of the car seat, the better the box hangs horizontally.
Got this for my dad who struggles with regular TV volume. Perfect for seniors.

This movie is a must have for the fans of Sally Field and James Gardner. It's a fun look at an older man in love with a younger woman. I love this shirt! It fits great...true to size, and is very chic looking. I always get compliments when I wear it.

Got this on sale for under ten bucks and honestly it's worth way more than that. I'd never heard of it before but took a chance based on a friend's recommendation. Man am I glad I did. The whole thing starts off pretty low-key, almost like a normal drama, but then it just keeps escalating into this absurd, hilarious mess where everything that can go wrong does go wrong. The cast is fantastic and clearly having a blast with the material. I've watched it twice now and caught jokes I missed the first time around. For the price of a rental you're getting a movie that actually holds up on repeat viewings. Definitely picking up a physical copy to lend to people. Absolute steal at this price.
just blank or empty containers to hold dvd's. shipped fairly fast and will meet my needs for storing dvd's. cheap enough also.
Exactly as advertised. It is sturdy, easy to assemble, and just right my 8 pound puppy.

I was looking forward to this book and it did not disappoint. My only issue is the making deals with Beauregard. I don't understand why Eddie did and now why pony boy did. I assume it will work out in another story, but still it's annoying and the reason it is four instead of five stars.
I was worried the non-slip base wouldn't hold, but it stays firmly in place on my tile counter.
Loved how easy it was to clean up. Perfect fit for my pup!

I got this cover with the idea of having a spare in case I messed up removing material to make the Qi adapter fit better (trying to reduce the lump it makes). It fits nicely, and seems to be pretty thin (which I wanted). My only slight complaint is that it isn't exactly what I'd call RED red. It's more of a dusty red, or a very dark pink. Kind of rosy, perhaps? Anyways, it actually works out okay for me because it matches the red portion of my Supcase Unicorn Beetle black/red case very VERY well. It's really hard to match reds, and the red of the case isn't particularly red, either. However, the color of the case and cover are so close as to pretty much be the same, which is great for me. A tiny ring of red now peeks out around the case's camera hole. I'm about to upload a picture, check it out. I think it looks pretty damn good. On a side note, and it doesn't bother me at all for my purposes - the cover isn't exactly what I'd call rubberized. I was expecting something perhaps a little grippy and more textured, but the cover is basically just matte finish. If it's actually "rubberized", then it's the thinnest rubber coating I've ever seen. If I ordered this with the intention of not using it with a case and having a grippy rear cover, I'd be pretty upset. Really, for my own purposes this is a 5 star product, but I think if I didn't have this narrow use-case, I'd have called it 4 stars. So there ya go.
Great value overall! Loved how easy it was to set up.
My dog, Sadie, use to get hot spots and after I switched her to this grain-free food they stopped! Her favorite is the Salmon, but she also like the Bison. Good choice for any picky eaters too.

This one's a mixed bag but definitely worth checking out if you enjoy classic performances. It doesn't hit all the right notes, but there's something authentic in it. I'd say it suits fans of older Hollywood stars more than casual viewers. Only recommend to those who appreciate the vibe, not the finish.

PART 2 PICKED RIGHT UP WHERE PART ONE ENDED. ALL I WILL SAY IS THESE GIRLS WILL GO ALL OUT FOR THEIR DAD EXCEPT ONE & I WANTED TO KICK HER BUTT. GREAT JOB PART 3 SHOULD BE HOT BECAUSE DADDY'S HOME!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

I got mixed feelings with this mattress. The shape stayed pretty flat on the edges, so one side was a bit short. But after waiting a couple days, it finally settled nicely. It gets hot quickly though, wake up feeling warm and a little sweaty right off the bed. The firmness is solid when it settles, but the initial fit wasn't perfect. Still worth trying if you're patient!
Excellent pack for the price. Not as large as some, but it is for my teenage son for scouting and he rarely changes clothes on a campout anyway.

I really been impressed with this fountain so far. It's not just a nice gadget, it actually makes a big difference in my house. I was expecting it to be noisy or low-maintenance, but it runs quietly and keeps flowing nonstop. Using water from different bowls each day has helped cut down on waste and keeps things fresh for the cats. Compared to other models I've tried, this one holds up better and looks great too. Definitely exceeded my expectations for a pet fountain!

This this faucet looks good and installs easily. If you don't have room under your sink to use a wrench to remove the old drain pop-up as in my case, just remove the drain-flange from the top-side of the sink by tapping it counter-clockwise with a small ballpein hammer and a nail setter. The new one will install hand tight without a wrench.

This movie is mean, man...!!! It was clearly made with the best of intentions: a history about a Secret Society and a young man ( Jackson in his worst performance ever ) trying to get out of it. But the execution of the screenplay is so bad that all is lost...

I was concerned by the other review that it might not fit and at first I put it on wrong but I got out the manual and followed it and it fit just right. Other reviewer may have had a real poor fit issue, though. But now I can shred!

I really loved this book, it matched my expectations perfectly. The story flowed smoothly and the details were impressive without being overwhelming. It felt like a great read that kept me hooked till the end.

Just like the rest of the Fobus line, this holster is not without it's faults. Right out of the bag, it's not perfect. This one happened to be way too tight. So tight I cold barely get the gun in and had an even harder time getting it out. Me, being the cheapskate that I am, took some sandpaper and oil and got this thing up and running. So now I have a $20 holster that performs like an $80 holster for about an hours worth of sanding and polishing. This goes well with my gym shorts or any time I'm not wearing a belt. Has a nice snap lock into place and since I wear mine with loose/stretchy waistbands, I wanted my draw to be loose as well. So I made it that way. Anyone can do it. If you take off too much, just make it a range holster. Can't go wrong.

This book really stands out because of its vivid storytelling. I loved how it included real quotes from survivors, it made history feel immediate and personal. The pages are crisp, and the writing is sharp. A must-read if you want a powerful reminder of what happened.

I picked this up hoping for something sharp and offbeat, but it just felt like work to get through. The stylistic quirks come across more as an affectation than anything that serves the story, and after a while I found myself rereading sentences not because they were clever but because they were awkwardly constructed. I'd only recommend it if you're really into experimental narrative voice and have the patience for a lot of navel-gazing prose, maybe an MFA student mining it for technique. For anyone wanting a casual, engaging read to unwind with, this probably isn't it. I finished it, but mostly out of stubbornness.
Great for campers who want a low-maintenance path light.

I've got a bone spur on my right foot that makes shoe shopping basically impossible. Most sneakers rub the wrong way within minutes and I end up limping by lunch. A friend recommended these so I figured why not try one more pair. Honestly didn't expect much at this point. But the padding around the collar is seriously cushioned without being tight, and there's this slight stretch to the material that accommodates my weird foot shape perfectly. Wore them to work three days straight, including a two mile walk on my lunch break, and zero discomfort. Like actually zero. The arch support hits in just the right spot too. They look clean enough to pass for casual office wear which is a nice bonus. Already thinking about grabbing a second pair before they sell out.

I picked this up on a whim since I've always loved the Bee Gees' disco era but knew almost nothing about their earlier stuff. Wow, what a fascinating story. The brothers' journey from Australia to global stardom is told really well here, and I kept finding myself going down rabbit holes listening to old tracks I'd never heard. I'd absolutely recommend this to anyone who grew up on their music, obviously, but also to casual fans who just want to understand how three siblings created such an unbelievable catalog across multiple decades.

Outstanding classic. True story of a small group of courageous British explorers in 1912 that dared not to show weakness in face of great pain and suffering during their journey to and from the south pole. Good cinematography of a frozen wasteland. A "horrible place" as Scott said.

This item arrived in perfect condition, and the packaging was spot on, thankful it didn't look damaged at all. I was a bit hesitant before ordering, but the first impression was great. The setup instructions were clear, which helped me get started right away. It's a solid choice for anyone looking for something durable yet stylish. Just make sure to check the size options carefully so your pet has the space it needs. Overall, a reliable purchase with a nice feel.

Got my wife the Kindle FIRE for the holiday and she is the type of person that needs a case and she loves green. This was the only green case I could find for the FIRE, but it has been absolutely awesome. It is almost like a faux leather and she loves it. More importantly, it has kept her Kindle safe from scratches an dings!

These sand spikes are absolute tanks. I fish a rocky shoreline where driving anything into the ground is a battle, but the solid aluminum construction takes a beating without bending. The built-in ruler is a surprisingly handy touch for quick measurements before a release. I've left them out in saltwater, mud, and blazing sun for months, and they still look new. No more propping rods against a cooler.

I've recently moved my old C100 to the office (3 years old and no problems) and picked the Citiz for home. Overall, it's a great looking machine that simply makes amazing espresso. Here's my quick notes and comparison with the Essenza C100: - The red and black have subtle differences in the spout and capsule release handle. The black has a chromed handle which makes it look a bit more classier and a different spout shape which I ended up getting. The overall build quality looks a bit nicer on the Citiz than the Essenza but I've only used it for almost two months so I can't comment on reliability but no problems yet. - The Citiz + milk has a significant larger footprint than the compact c100. However, it does integrate the frother using one plug which is a bonus. - The folding pedastal cup holder on the Citiz is great for my larger mugs which I had to alway tilt and hold on the Essenza which was a major annoyance. - The new Aerocinno is amazing... a much better improvement over the older non-plus version and worth the extra money. The foam taste is a whole lot better as far as texture goes. The only thing is that it no longer uses a clever magnetic lid to keep the extra attachment. - Overall, the Citiz amd Essenza are equally as good as the espresso taste great with both. I could recommend the Essenza for the cheaper price, in my case track proven reliability, a smaller footprint since the Aerocinno is separate and can be stored away. But for some reason, I'm just drawn to the look and "presence" of the Citiz. It's something that looks subtly classy in the kitchen and makes an easy process of making a cappuccino that much more enjoyable.
Perfect size for my bearded dragon. Sturdy plastic and cleans up super easy.
The packaging was flimsy but arrived fine. First impressions were zero stars, signal issues popped up right away. Disappointed with both performance and shipping experience.
if you like the look then get it. fits perfect, no issues, nice build.

This tunnel has been a total game-changer for our two kittens. The crinkle fabric sends them into a frenzy every single time, and I love that it folds flat for easy storage under the couch. It's held up surprisingly well against their constant bunny-kicking attacks, which is more than I can say for other toys we've tried.
Perfect for pet owners. Grabs fur off furniture instantly without hauling out the full vacuum. Every cat person needs one.

This product seemed to work perfectly well. However, I put this on my keychain, which went into my pocket. The problem is that the little white cap falls off all the time. It is too loosely fitted to the drive, making it fall off with little to no force. It was only a matter of time before the cap fell off without my noticing. Now, I have no cap, and the device is pretty worthless to me without its cap.

I really liked how this book kept me guessing about the characters' motives, it kept me hooked. One thing I missed was some of that raw sexual tension from the SR crew, but overall it's a solid read. The writing is smooth and engaging, making it easy to stay immersed. A nice improvement over the earlier volumes, though I wish more depth came with each new installment. It's definitely worth a try if you enjoy complex storytelling.

Arrived two days early in a sturdy padded mailer with no cracks or scratches on the case. Popped it in right away and the picture quality blew me away. The Palace backdrop is absolutely gorgeous on screen. Really impressed with how fast this shipped and the whole thing looks fantastic. So glad I grabbed this.

Loved the size and style of this bag! The main thing is it holds a lot and looks neat. A bit confused with that zipper design on the side pocket though, and the strap was tight for my height. Would really appreciate an extra pocket inside. Overall a solid pick with some tweaks needed.

I've read a bunch of stuff from this author before so my expectations were honestly pretty high. This one didn't quite land for me though. The beginning sets things up nicely and I was invested, but then the whole middle section just drags. Way too much time spent on the relationship drama between the two leads when I really wanted more actual investigation and forward momentum. The romantic tension feels forced at times, especially since she keeps going back and forth about what she even wants. Seth's patience with the whole situation didn't feel realistic to me. Things do pick up again near the end and the last few chapters were genuinely exciting. Not a bad read overall, just uneven compared to what I was hoping for.

This book really dives into the complex history of the Cold War and crypto battles between the US and USSR. It felt detailed but a bit heavy at times. I loved picking up short breaks along the way, which made it easier to digest. Great depth without being overwhelming, definitely worth the time if you enjoy political tech stories.

I grab these anytime I'm heading out on the boat or doing yard work. They stay put surprisingly well, even when I'm sweating. The clarity is decent for the price, though they scratch a bit easy. I'd definitely recommend them to anyone who wants a no-worry pair for active days outdoors.
This is the kind of glove I used years ago as a kid. They fit well and are comfortable. Great retro look as well.
Great quality trousers, runs slightly small. Would definitely recommend to anyone wanting nice wool blend pants.

I've been using Corsair products for the last 10 years or so, and I've never had one of their products let me down. I've got previous experience with their memory sticks, power supplies, mice, and static pressure fans. None of these products of their that I've used have ever had any issues or have ever stopped working prematurely. With that in mind, these ML120 RGB PWM fans have been working great for me too. I've installed all three fans, along with the Lighting Node module in a Cooler Master Storm Trooper case set up for front to rear airflow. The fans are PWM speed controlled through the header pins on my Asus motherboard with a custom fan speed curve programmed in specific to the individual properties of each fan and mounting location. These fans are providing plenty of airflow in the case and only ramp up to higher speeds that become somewhat audible, under more stressful computer loads. The majority of the time they run at reduced RPM's that are virtually inaudible compared to the rest of the ambient room noise. Never once has their airflow become inadequate, not even in an 85F ambient temperature room. The iCUE software that controls that lighting features of these RGB fans allows them to be set up for a myriad of different color combinations, including dynamically changing colors based on what software is being run or games being played. The software has a small learning curve in order to get the most out of the features, and feature packed it is. Overall these are excellent fans with more than adequate airflow for my needs, and they add a lot of visual pizazz too. Visitors always stop and comment on the colorful light show these case fans provide.

These are cute and colorful silicone reusable cupcake molds. They will make a smaller than normal cupcake which is fine by me but may not be for everyone. I found that if you fill the molds half way or more the final resulting cupcake doesn't much resemble a butterfly. If you only fill the molds about the third of the way the finished product will be smaller but will look like a butterfly especially when frosted and decorated. These molds don't each hold the same shape. They are fairly thin and do distort easily. They are a bit of work to clean. My brand new dishwasher didn't get them completely clean so I suggest you wash them by hand, which can be a chore. I will definitely use these again but not as often as I thought I would.
