I'm a science teacher, and when I saw this, I thought it would be perfect for my nephews. It's a really cute set and has lots of neat patterns to view under the "microscope." There are 3 lenses....one is a mangnifier, one is a color lens, and the third is "textured" to alter the pattern of what you see under the microscope. Each pattern disk has various patterns on each side, so there is lots to look at. The only thing I'm not fond of is the magnification "lens." It's really cheap and doesn't really magnify anything...just makes everything blurry. I know this isn't a real microscope and whatnot, but I feel that the lens could have at least been a more decent magnifier than it is. Despite that flaw, it's a cute kit and I think that kids will love it/enjoy being "scientists!"

My big dog just goes crazy over this toy. She will even flip it around and play all by herself, but mostly it is a retrieving toy. There are 2 balls encased in the heavy nylon fabric, one is hollow and produces a squeaker noise that is loud and sounds like 3 different tones at once. I really like this toy because it stands up to very hard tug games. My dog isn't a chewer but I still pick it up and put it away after playtime just in case.

I wasn't expecting much for the price but this little lamp genuinely surprised me. Most small desk lamps I've tried are top-heavy and wobble every time you adjust the angle, but this one sits completely solid. The base is surprisingly thin yet has enough weight to keep everything planted firmly. I was worried the footprint would still eat up too much real estate on my crowded nightstand, but the base actually slides right under my organizer tray no problem. It's like the lamp is barely there. The finish looks way more expensive than what I paid too, no cheap shine or plasticky feel. Assembly took about thirty seconds. Honestly exceeded my expectations on every front. Would buy again without hesitation.

This movie is ridiculous. Rowdy Roddy Piper is one of the last fertile men on earth, 10 years after a nuclear war. So, they send him into the mutant reserve to rescue the harem he is supposed to use to repopulate the country with, so they can rearm and destroy the 'enemy', ostensibly the Soviets. The lizards are pretty awesome, this might be the best b-movie of all time. One of my favorites!

I started looking for climbing toys for our now 17mth old before Christmas & after hours online, this was my fav. I planned to buy it for our daughters big Santa gift but hesitated after reading some reviews about poor safety features...when the priced dropped after Christmas, I'd still not found anything I liked better so I decided to give it a shot. I am SO glad I ignored the few negative reviews. It is absolutely perfect for our energetic, climbing toddler. She is able to climb the wall with no trouble, the slide is fast & long enough for her to enjoy, she can get a ball into the basketball hoop herself & while the potential is there with most any toy for a child to use it incorrectly and possibly get hurt, under minimal supervision, I see no imminent risk in this toy. (the concerns I read were toddlers "diving" through the hole for footballs to be thrown through). That particular opening in question does not hit our child in a place height wise where that is an issue. If she's standing, the hole is around her belly, if she sits, she can peek through the hole, but with the majority of her body safely on the platform, she isn't likely to fall from it. A child, if intentionally trying to dive through, coud get it through it I guess but it doesnt seem very probable. Again, I'm glad I bypassed that info and ordered anyway. I was also glad it was not quite as huge as I'd envisioned, it will be easy to move outside in warmer weather. It was also easy to put together which is a major plus! As a child development professional, I'd also recommend this for building gross motor skills. Definitely recommend this toy, we are so pleased with it...most importantly, so is our child! Alas, she has something she is allowed to climb on & it satisfies that natural interest for her, safely!
We bought this used. There wasn't a thing wrong with it and the kids love moving them around and climbing on them.
For under twenty bucks, I wasn't expecting much, but the sound is crisp and battery lasts my whole shift. Super comfortable and pairs instantly.

I've been very pleased with these leggings. I'm 5'11" and usually a L/XL size that says it will fit me, does not. I was very impressed that these DID fit. They ended about 3 inches above my ankles, but could be pulled lower, resulting in a thinner, stretched legging. I was also impressed with how versatile the sizing can be for these because of the elastic waistband and stretchy fleece. These are true to the claim that they do not contain a seam. The inside is a very soft, low pile fleece material. The outside is smoother, not furry. The elastic waistband is incorporated INTO the fabric, so the waist is VERY comfortable and not bulky at all. These keep my legs warm in the winter and pair nicely with a boot. I have noticed that when something rubs against them in the same place over and over, they can get little fuzz balls. They also attract animal hair like crazy. If you have pets you will probably become frustrated with this. However, I've noticed that this is common with ALL fleece leggings so I am not removing a star for it - only letting other customer's know what to expect. Discounted sample tested for evaluation and review purposes.
Great product! great looks for my Mac! Loved it! very easy to install Just hope to last long enough!

I grabbed these hoping to simplify note-taking across my devices, but the results are all over the place. On my older Samsung tablet they respond decently most of the time, though I still get random dead spots. On my daughter's newer Fire tablet it's a coin toss, sometimes it glides, other times I'm tapping three or four times just to open an app. The tips feel okay and they're comfortable to hold, so the basics are there. Battery life is fine for casual use. I just wish the consistency was better across different screens. If you only plan to use them on one device that happens to play nice, you might be happier. For me, the unpredictability drags down an otherwise solid stylus. Three stars feels right.

There is not a strong enough word I can think of to describe the intensity of emotions that come with reading this book, it is like getting hit by an emotional tsunami and you feel the effects for days... This is a love story of the deepest and truest kind.. Love of family, friends and destined lovers... Jagger and Tenley suffer through disappointment, betrayal, unbearable grief, and seperation... Each living through their own personal hell alone but are either of them truly living or just going through the motions.... It will take miracle or words from beyond to help Tenley to decide if she chose wrong and find her way back.... This book deserves way more then 5 stars....
I love that the cap stays sealed tight, so no moisture clumps up my spices anymore.

I enjoyed the storyline, compelling. The threat from any organization has one jumping at shadows and Corchado proves that he is not above the rest when it presents itself to him. I did enjoy the author's history because it parallels my own. I can empathize And true to the case that very few of us imigrants still hold on to hope that the situation in Mexico will improve for the better. It must. The one thing that kept me from rating this book better was the constant use of translating the 'Mexicanisms' everywhere it is used. Even some that were translated already chapters before. It felt like the author was looking for wordcount buildup. The flow of the story is constantly interrupted by the translated repetitions. Like a street with too many unecessary speed humps you eventually would avoid, I stopped reading halfway through. But I do intend to pick it up down the line to finish the read. I am curious if the author got fed to the tigers.
Expected way better quality for the price. Stopped powering on after barely three weeks of use.
I went in expecting the tight storytelling from her earlier series, but this felt like a first draft. Scattered plots, flat characters, really let down.

For under ten bucks, this collar's a steal. The bright teal color hasn't faded after weeks of use. The buckle feels a little flimsy, but honestly, for the price I paid, I'm not complaining. It does the job.
Arrived quickly in sturdy packaging. Flipping through, looks promising.
Watched it twice now and the disc still plays perfectly without any scratches. The film itself is just okay though, kind of slow in the middle.

Bought this three months ago for my terrier who destroys everything. Still intact with no rips or loose seams. The motion sensor keeps triggering randomly but honestly the toy itself is impressively tough. Worth every penny.
Bought this a few months ago and the disc started skipping halfway through our second watch.

The size is exactly what I need. It serves the purpose, however, it has to be treated very gently, being careful not to break the plastic hinges or to have bottles flying around when pulling out the drawers. Plastic bottles work better because they are not as heavy. The idea is good and would be better if it were made of metal.
Solid build but runs tiny. Would only suggest this for kids or petite users.

Stephanie Plum is hunting down Sandy Claws, a Failed-to-Appear, who definitely resembles Santa, since he is hiring elves to make toys for Christmas. Stephanie has some help with hunting down Sandy Claws and unfortunately it's not Ranger or Morelli. No a supernatural being named "Diesel" has popped into her kitchen and is offering to help locate Sandy and get into the Christmas spirit. With a few days until Christmas, there is plenty of time to get into trouble, blow up a car or two and get into a tussle with elves, which is exactly what Stephanie does. I do love the Stephanie Plum books. I read them years ago and I'm now re-reading them as audiobooks. Visions of Sugar Plums seemed like the perfect listen while I was doing all my holiday baking, and it was. It was certainly fun and over-the-top and what we expect from Janet Evanovich. I like that even though this is just a novella we saw all my favorites, well except for Ranger, and there were some hilarious moments with Grandma Mazur. I've listened to quite a few of these books with the narration by Lorelai King and I like her voice. She's certainly become the voice of Stephanie, Lula and Grandma Mazur for me. Her voice for Diesel seemed a little slow to catch my interest, but by the end I enjoyed it as much as the others. I definitely plan to listen to the rest of the books in audio version.

A friend once told me about this hairball remedy and I have been using it ever since. We have a Maine Coon/Tabby 18# girl with layers and layers of fur. She is brushed twice daily but she consumes so much fur she needs this as well. I also use it for two other cats with semi long fur. Works great. If they don't like it, I put some on top of their paw and rub it in so they have no choice but to lick it off.
These 3 inch S hooks are perfect to hang my dusters and brushes in my closet. They are sturdy and decent looking.

I bought my sg3 brand new about 5/6 yrs ago, it still works like a champ til this day. Played a round this past Saturday. It doesn't have all the bells and whistles like the newer models, but its accurate, links to the satellite in 1 or 2 mins, gives me carried yardage, hazard yardage (front and carry), distance to middle, front and back of greens, you can use the small joystick to place the pin in appropriate place on green for more accurated pin yardage. It has a score feature, but it takes to long to get to the next hole, so I have this feature turned off. All in all, I LOVE IT, they don't make this model anymore, but I bet the refurbished sg3 is just as good, unless your into color screens, touch screens and other things that slows your game down. This one gives you what you need, accurate yardage to hazards, lay ups and pin, so all you need is good golf shot. Oh yea, it takes 2 AA batteries that last approximately 2 rounds and you pay for the courses, but its a minimal yearly subscription and the website is very easy to use and downloads or quik

A spectacular presentation that explores the life of a cinematic and creative genius, interspersed with intriguing footage of and commentary by Welles himself. If there is any weakness to the presentation, I would have liked to know more about Welles' work in professional magic beyond the delightful snippets interspersed through the film. As a Welles fan, I found this documentary extensive, fast-paced, intersting, and very educational! Highly recommended!

I don't remember the last time I owned a hand vac. Never been inclined to buy one before because the suction wasn't that great and they're difficult to keep clean. This one has all the power I need and the battery (so far) hasn't been a problem. So much so, I bought 2 more on a clearance sale. As someone else said, I don't understand the negative comments. The blower is at the bottom but so far I haven't had any problem with picking up dust and even feathers which get randomly get blown into my house. The detachable cone is simple to undo and empty however on the down side, the filter is not that easy to clean. Dust, especially if you try washing it, gets stuck between the crevices. Also, the crevice and brush tool don't snap in so they easily pop out. Had to apply a bit of duct tape.
For my use this is just right, single live alone fixens for one.

I purchased these magnets to go along with a magnet board I made for my son's 2nd birthday gift. They're made of relatively thick foam with the entire back side covered with a magnet. My son got ahold of the train and gnawed on it for a good 5 minutes before we noticed. The picture I attached shows a brand new pig and the train post-chew session. Even after his pit bull like gnawing, the train still looks pretty good, although you can see the indentations from his teeth. I like the variety of objects included as it'll help in expanding his everyday vocabulary.

It's made of a terrible fabric. Dress Shirt?, forget about it. The image uploaded by the seller it's very very tricky. It looks great in the photograph, but it doesn't once you have the shirt on your hands at front of you. Don't buy it.
Perfect everyday jeans for guys who want that classic straight-leg look. Highly recommend to any denim lover.

Bought this on Blu-ray two years back and it still plays flawlessly despite being loaned out constantly. The disc has survived my teenagers' rough handling without a single skip. Great film that holds up to repeat viewings too.
I can say it really is a good flick of it's day and Charlton Heston really played it.

This is a perfect little swing. We hung it up in our front yard in a little tree and my 6 and 4 year old have not left it alone. I have not seen one flaw with this swing. We plan on keeping it in our travel trailer for camping all summer. Very very pleased with this swing. I did receive it at a discounted rate in return for my review but I really do love it.

Got these for my heavy bag workouts after my old gloves literally fell apart at the seams. The difference is night and day. The wrist support is solid, which matters because I've tweaked my wrist before from sloppy punches. Padding absorbs impact well without feeling bulky. I'm a medium-sized guy and the large fits perfectly with hand wraps underneath. My training partner tried them on and immediately ordered his own pair. I'd recommend these to anyone doing bag work, sparring, or Muay Thai pads. They're not the cheapest option out there but honestly worth every penny for the construction quality alone. Six months in and zero issues.

I almost put this book down after the first chapter because the pacing felt so languid and aimless. But then the world-building clicked, and I couldn't stop reading. What really stood out to me was how the author handles moral ambiguity, none of the characters are purely good or evil, and their motivations constantly shift in ways that feel messy and human. The quiet, atmospheric scenes in the middle section, especially the long conversation in the abandoned church, had a tension that hit harder than any action sequence. It's the kind of book that rewards patience with a slow-burn payoff. Not a breezy read, but deeply satisfying if you stick with it.
Shipped fast and well-protected. Movie looks solid so far, can't wait to finish.

I have purchased a total of 4 of these Whipple sets. My son and 2 older daughters each got one and absolutely loved making these creations. They had so much fun with it that we bought one for their cousin for her birthday, too. I've got an adorable little pie keychain now to show for it!

I've had this sitting on my Kindle for about eight months now, reread it twice, and it holds up incredibly well on the second pass. The world-building doesn't thin out like some series do by this point. Characters actually grow instead of resetting each book. The plot twists still surprised me even knowing what was coming. My only complaint is the wait for the next installment. Easily my most reread sci-fi purchase this year.
The vibrant costumes and authentic set design totally transported me back in time.

a delightful visionary work that features a lovable cast of characters that often prove surreal as well as very human. Among the family friendly films out there, this one presents plenty of visual treats and humor to hold adult attention. The soundtrack is pretty groovy, too.
what can you say, good food, well balanced and the dogs loved it arrived well packed undamaged and in a very timely amount of time
The memory foam sole is amazing. I can wear these all day and my feet never hurt. Worth every penny.

The material feels decent and construction seems solid, but the band runs noticeably small. I typically wear a 38 with no issues, but this one barely clasped. Had to return for a larger size. Not bad quality-wise, just be aware of the tight fit.

I really enjoyed this product after a tough day with my dog. It worked fast when I needed it most and felt great about using it. The instructions were clear, and it helped without any hassle. A solid pick for pet care supplies.

Somehow all four of mine made it intact but one has a small chip on the rim that I decided to just live with. The quality of the actual cups deserves five stars but the packing is a gamble. I'd say go for it if you don't mind possibly dealing with a return or exchange. Really beautiful drinkware, just wish they'd wrap them better.

I got these for my daughter-in-law who is a huge Cardinal's fan and a runner. She, unfortunately for her, lives in a family of equally strong Cub's fans. I bought this for my son and its working much better than the older one I had my son use for target shooting in an indoor range. My son is very happy with these earmuffs. Very happy with the product brand.

I really liked this product after giving it a try. As someone who keeps cats indoors but still faces occasional fungal issues, I found it helpful. The application was simple and the results were noticeable within a few days. It's not the cheapest option, but it delivers consistent performance. I appreciate the brand's effort to offer solutions for common pet health problems. Overall, it worked well and gave me confidence in treating my cat's condition. The experience was positive, even with the slight cost, so it's worth trying if you face similar challenges.

An oven mitt isn't really the kind of thing I put a lot of thought into, but in using this one, I've quickly come to appreciate the difference between an afterthought and an item borne of deliberate design. I got this to replace a potholder I'd used for years, and I immediately appreciated the advantage of not having to worry about dropping it or slipping my grip. The design allots plenty of hand flexibility, and this is especially noticeable in the thumb area- All-clad promotes the thumb design on this product, and with good reason, as it allows total flexibility, which is crucial when handling hot pans and pots. The craftsmanship is first-rate, and the grip and insulation are good- I never felt like I had a weak or unsteady hold on anything, and my hand never got warm, much less hot. An oven mitt is a utility item that gets used daily; to my way of thinking, paying a bit more for an exponentially higher-quality mitt is an obviously good investment.

This bacon cooking product is much more efficient than a previous, different style of bacon/microwave cooker. It is less messy with only one paper towel draped across the top. You can see how the bacon is cooking and either shorten the cooking time or lengthen it to have bacon just the way you like it or need it. Sometimes we need partially cooked bacon to use in recipes where it needs to be flexible for incorporation with other food, and then cooked to completion. This product perfectly satisfies that need. I highly recommend this product for anyone who uses/enjoys perfect bacon.
Took it camping last weekend, worked pretty well for the price.

Great value for the money! The wok fits perfectly and stays cool when hot. Loved the sturdy wooden handle, definitely worth every penny. Perfect for everyday cooking at home.

I really enjoyed this item after trying it before. The fit was just right and comfortable enough to wear for a week. The fabric feels soft but not overly thick. It's a bit cozier than expected, which I appreciated. Overall a solid pick for the price.

I really wanted to love this towel bar since the finish matches my bathroom hardware perfectly and the depth works great for my narrow wall. But honestly, the mounting situation is a mess. The brackets that attach to the wall feel super flimsy and the screws that came with it are incredibly cheap, I stripped two of them just trying to get them into the drywall with a regular screwdriver. On top of that, there are no anchors included, so unless you're lucky enough to hit a stud, you're on your own figuring out how to keep this thing attached to the wall. For the price, I expected better hardware. The bar itself looks nice once up but getting there was way more frustrating than it should have been.

This book is hot! Can you imagine that you can carry the child that can reunite a planet? The catch is you will have 3 mates, who happen to be identical triplets wowzers! This is a steamy novel, but the story is interesting and enjoyable. I found it hard to put down and read it in an afternoon.

I have all the Honor series and this is the book I like least. Author seems to have run out of fresh ideas. In fact, there were parts of the book where I was sure I had read in previous books. Story line started out good but sort of faded out as the book porgressed

Wish I had bought this years ago. Setting up repetitive cuts on my miter saw used to be a chore, clamping stop blocks, double-checking measurements, hoping nothing shifted. This completely changed my workflow. Once you dial in your measurements, every single cut comes out identical. I've run through a few hundred feet of trim and baseboard so far with zero drift. Build quality is solid. Nothing feels flimsy or loose. The mechanism operates smoothly without any play. Installation took maybe fifteen minutes on my DeWalt, and the included hardware covered everything I needed. If you do production work or even just tackle weekend projects where accuracy matters, do yourself a favor and get one. The time savings alone paid for it within the first job. Absolutely worth every penny.

Trash, but trash with a certain pedigree. Ordinarily Stuart Whitman should not be compared with the can't take your eyes off them greats and there's nothing here to make you think otherwise, but in spite of it all it does possess a certain something...Janet Leigh? Maybe.
Works exactly as intended! Both sizes of HDD work in this, and I have yet to run into an issue with years of using it.
A fun movie that at times is very violent/gory but with great action sequences. Sometimes the plot veers off its track but it's still a fun waste of time.

Was honestly shocked at the quality for what I paid. Most hammocks in this price range feel paper-thin or have sketchy stitching, but the fabric on this thing is heavy-duty and the seams are triple-stitched. I'm 6'1" and 215 lbs, and it holds me up no problem with plenty of room to spare. The whole thing packs down into the attached sack which is clutch for backpacking, barely takes up any space in my pack. I've had it set up in my backyard for about three weeks straight through rain and sun with zero fading or fraying. Yeah, you'll probably want to grab some longer straps since the included cord is pretty short, but for under thirty bucks you really can't complain. Way better than the expensive brand name ones my buddies overpaid for.
It started strong and I learned a few things, but the middle dragged more than I expected. Not bad, just not a page-turner for me.
This is the best collar I have ever gotten for my sweet dog! Sturdy, attractive and washable! We both love it.

Honestly grabbed this thinking it'd be just another pocket light that fizzles after a week. Nope. Thing's built solid and throws way more beam than anything this size should. The dual brightness caught me off guard; low is perfect for up-close wiring tags without washing everything out. High lights up an entire engine bay no problem. For the cost I figured I'd get mediocre, not something I reach for over my bulky shop light. Absolutely punches above its weight.

The box arrived a day early and was packed with serious care, thick foam inserts holding everything snug, no scuffs or loose parts anywhere. Pulling the canister out for the first time, I could immediately tell this thing is built solid. The plastic feels thick, the latches snap shut with a confident click, and the included media was neatly organized and ready to go. Setup on my 20 gallon tank took maybe fifteen minutes, and it primed smoothly on the first try, no awkward sucking on hoses or fussing with valves. It's dead quiet, too. Honestly, after unboxing it and getting it running, I'm already impressed before even seeing the long-term results.

My spool set arrived two days early and was packed with real care, each spool nested in its own snug compartment, zero scuffs or loose bits. First thing I noticed was how solid the wooden dowel feels; no flex or wobble when you tug a strand. The plastic spools themselves have a nice smooth finish, so wire feeds out without snagging, which was a pleasant surprise right out of the box. I've already used three spools for re-wiring some vintage tube gear and the whole thing just sits neatly on the corner of my bench. For the price, the presentation and build quality honestly exceeded my expectations. This is one of those rare purchases that just feels dialed-in from the moment you open it.

This is sturdy and lasted a couple of weeks. Even after the stuffing is pulled out, our dog still works on the outside. We buy it over and over because our dog loves working on it until she is successul getting all the stuffing out. And then some...

I went in expecting another generic sci-fi romance with a flimsy plot and generic characters, but this completely surprised me. Steffania and Ramsey have genuine chemistry that builds naturally instead of feeling forced. The worldbuilding is way more detailed than I anticipated, each planet they visit actually has its own distinct culture and ecosystem rather than just being a generic backdrop for the romance. What really hooked me though was how both characters have real flaws and insecurities that make them feel like actual people. Steffania is tough but not annoyingly perfect, and Ramsey's backstory gives him real depth. The action scenes are well-paced and the spicy moments actually fit the story instead of feeling randomly inserted. Way better than I expected going in.

I wanted to like this top because the fabric is actually soft and the color is a nice rich charcoal. But the neck is just weird, it's way too short to be called a turtleneck, barely hits mid-neck, and the side gaps make it look sloppy and misshapen. I kept adjusting it all day. For reference, I'm petite and the small still fit awkwardly. Disappointing.

Exceeded what I was expecting this to be. Super cute and my daughter loves it. For all the little shimmer and shine fans this is a must have. The wrist bands fit my 3 year old perfectly with some room to grow in. You can actually use the brush as well.

Ordered this for my anniversary and it showed up two days earlier than expected. The box was really well protected with plenty of cushioning so nothing shifted around in transit. The blue hands are even prettier in person and really pop against the face. Love that it came with both a black and brown strap so I can switch things up depending on my outfit. Had to get a couple links removed at my local jeweler but that's normal. Wore it to dinner last night and already got compliments. Really happy with this purchase so far.
A birthday gfit for my great niece....she loved it! Good price,came fast in the mail also. She is enjoying playing with it!

works, and when it doesn't they fix it or replace it.. have two of them.. one worked from day one... the other needed fixed.. we like turning on the shower and walking away to get clothes ready etc, nice not to waste water once the shower is up to temperature. a good idea, and works, not for little kids... have to be able to reach the cord to open shower head when temp reached. use good judgement when you choose water temp

I've been using these towels daily for about five months now, and I'm honestly impressed with how well they've held up. Most towels I buy start fraying at the edges or getting that rough, cardboard feel after a few wash cycles, but these still feel soft and look practically new. The stitching along the borders is solid, no loose threads anywhere. They're thinner than my usual plush bath sheets, which took some getting used to, but that actually means they dry faster between uses and don't get that musty smell. Knocked off one star because I wish the bath towel was a bit larger, but for the price and longevity, I'd definitely buy another set.

When is the next book?? Wow! This was sooo good! It was very hard for me to put this book down once I started it. The story was well written to the point I cried at times. I could feel the pain and angst the main character, Ana, was going through. Ana doesnt reveal what happened in her past right away but there were enough hints that I was heartbroken for her. I was rooting for Ana through the whole book and it was a complete rollercoaster for her (as well as for me!!). I don't want to give anything away as to what happened with Ana but there is a huge cliffhanger at the end of the book. It was one of those that sucked the air out of my lungs because I couldn't believe what just happened. It was one of those endings that I had to sit back and give myself some time to digest and figure out what I will read next. Book 2 isn't currently out or it would be a no brainer what my next book was.

I wanted to like this, but for the price I paid it just doesn't hold up. The pacing drags so much that by the halfway point I was checking my phone, and the emotional beats feel forced instead of earned. Dennis Quaid gives it his all, but the script lets him down with clunky dialogue and scenes that go nowhere. Winona Ryder's role is underwritten to the point of distraction, she's barely given anything to work with. I get that biopics take liberties, but this one feels hollow and rushed in all the wrong places. Rent it if you're curious, but buying it at full cost left me wishing I'd just streamed something else.

My new Canon 6D Mark II has a touch screen. Everyone always thinks that they will never scratch or damage it, and then we do. This isn't an absolute protection, but it sure will ward off 90% of the stupid things that a guy will usually do as he puts a big scratch on the glass.

This cookbook is a total gem for anyone who's busy but still wants to pull together something fresh and homemade without a grocery scavenger hunt. I'd hand it to new grads, working parents, or really anyone who thinks they can't cook, everything is that approachable. The instructions are clear, the ingredient lists don't send you to specialty shops, and the flavor combos feel thoughtful, not phoned in. I've already tagged half the pages and gifted a copy to my brother who just moved into his first apartment.

For the quality you get, these are an absolute steal. I was hesitant at first because the price seemed too good for leather this nice, but they've held up beautifully after three months of daily wear. The sole has great grip and the cushioning is solid for long shifts. I went true to size and had zero issues with the fit. Broke in within a week and now they feel like slippers. Honestly compares to brands costing three times as much. Can't recommend enough.

Actually, with this electronic headset for hearing protection, I'm able to hear everything going on around me. Nice feature to be able to adjust the volume setting you're comfortable with & no matter how high the setting is, you'll appreciate the noise cancellation when your shooting your firearms. The design is practical & comfortable. I've had these on for hours with no discomfort or irritation. If you're in a pinch for space to put these, they fold in to a very manageable size that can easily be placed in your range bag. One thing to note: you'll discover that placing the battery on each side of the headset is a little challenging. By that I mean you have to be a little forceful to pry the cushioned ear piece from the plastic headphone. Once you do the first one the second will be much easier. Other than that little bump in the road, this is a terrific product that I would highly recommend to interested parties.
Perfect for longtime Kinsey Millhone fans. I'd hands down recommend this to anyone who loves a solid mystery with a sharp protagonist. Couldn't put it down.

I picked up a few of these modular boxes after eyeing them for months, and for the money, they're honestly hard to beat. I use the medium and large ones mostly for camping gear and emergency truck supplies. They clip together securely and have survived some pretty rough dirt roads without popping open. The plastic feels sturdy enough for daily use, though I wouldn't throw them off a roof. My only minor gripe is the lid latch design feels a little stiff at first, but it loosens up. For what these cost compared to name-brand systems, you're getting a ton of practical organization without breaking the bank. Definitely worth grabbing a couple extra when they're on sale.

Not bad enough to return but probably won't reread it either. Three stars feels right for what it is.

After watching a couple episodes of "An Idiot Abroad," I had trouble sleeping because of the suffering of this man. The look on his face as he looked up at his would be captors showed a level of fear, confusion and pain which I found to be unbearable to see. Having watched "Extras," it seemed impossible to believe that Ricky Gervais would deliberately cause a person to be sick, hungry, sleepless and afraid. At the beginning of the episode where Karl is in China, Karl says "is he havin a laugh? and I thought that perhaps Gervais, Merchant and Pilkington are `avin a laugh" on us and that this was a deliberate reference to "Extras.". I hope that is the case. This would mean that the viewers are shown to be the sadists that those who made the show suspected they would be. I also began to doubt that Karl is the childlike person he is portrayed as being because although childlike people say funny things at times, they tend not so say funny things continuously. Also, Karl Pilkington makes no funny comments about a man whose face is deformed. Perhaps Karl Pilkington is a very clever man who is good at keeping a straight face.
Perfect for DIYers replacing old parts, saves serious cash over the brand name version.
Use it at work with our staff of 5. Holding up well.

There are few flashlights as versital as this. Streamlight makes this device in many vetsions. I prefer the sportsman model as the tactical ones include an infra red led. If you have nvg's you might prefer the tactical versions. There is one other big difference between the military and sportsman models. The military ones will start at the lowest setting once activated. The sportsman is just the opposite. The various colored leds serve various rolls. Red keeps up your night vision, great for not disturbing your partner at night when nature cqlls. Green is the color human eyes are mosr sensative to. The blue is a bit of an anigima. Someone with more detailed info should be refrenced here. This my 'go to' flashlight. I keep one at my bedside and another in the end table next to my easy chair. It's hard to find anything to complain about this. I reccomend you get one or two. I know they are expensive but if your safety depends on a good flashlight, do you really want a $5 cheap wally world one?
I really loved how this book keeps me engaged all day. The story was smooth and the pacing kept it fresh. A little repetitive at times but definitely worth reading. Great value for what it offers!

Got this kit to mess around with my old speedlight and honestly had pretty low expectations given the price tag. Everything showed up intact and has held up through a few weekend shoots already. The softbox is a bit fiddly to set up the first time, and the grid could fit a little snugger, but nothing's fallen apart on me. For a beginner like me trying to figure out what modifiers I actually like using, it's been perfect. Hard to beat the value here.

This book was as good as the first. With deputy Will, now the sheriff of Broken Spur. A green eyed beauty comes storming into Will's office, demanding the release of her father. Will is smitten at first sight, but won't release her father until he sobers up some (town rules). This just makes her madder, but she will have to return later. Read this exciting new story to find out what happens. I hope you enjoy burnt Ppl as much as I did.
After six months of heavy use, still going strong. Worth the price.
Can't believe how solid these are for what I paid.

I soooo wanted to like this item, due to its nice looking design and how it stopped my memory foam from slipping! The design is the only reason why I have given two stars and not one. Heres the deal breaker: this cool gel cover is like an extreme HEATING PAD! After I completed assembly necessary to sleep in my new bed, I was in need of a nap because I was exhausted. My nap was interrupted by the constant sensation of feeling as if I was about to erupt in flames. This product TRAPS AND STORES HEAT! I had to end my nap in order to avoid becoming a sweaty mess during the day.

This car is awesome and I would definitely recommend it to anyone who may be looking at it as a gift for the holidays. Your kids will love it's 360 degree spinning action! Both customer service & shipping exceeded expectations. The battery I was not too thrilled with but it plainly states in the details that it only lasts for up to 8-10 mins of play before recharging. Definitely recommend buying an extra battery so you can still play while the other battery is charging. definitely would buy from again!
The stitching is horrible!!!!!!!! The one picture I have here shows a small string pointing up. That was the only thing holding it together spend extra money and get something better
fast delivery. Really useful if you need to have a long connection to speakers or head set.
For the cost, these feel way more expensive than they are.
Robyn's story stuck with me, but the paperback spine started splitting halfway through my second read.
Solid little unit for the money. Not fancy but gets the job done without breaking the bank.

Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with no damage. The machining on this thing is seriously impressive for the price, tight tolerances, clean edges, zero slop. Already ran a few test holes on a scrap door and it lined up perfectly both sides. Solid first impression.

Picked this up on a Kindle deal for 99 cents and honestly it was worth exactly that much. The whole enemies-to-lovers dynamic between the two leads had potential but the execution felt pretty generic. They bicker, they resist the obvious attraction, then eventually give in. You've read this plot a hundred times already. The intimate scenes are well written and there's decent chemistry, but the miscommunication trope got old fast. Like just talk to each other for five minutes? At under three bucks I don't regret the purchase and it killed a few hours by the pool. Would I pay full price? No chance. It's a perfectly average romance that checks the boxes without doing anything memorable. Grab it on sale if you're bored between better reads.
Really enjoyed these tales. My paperback has held up great after months of being tossed in my backpack and read on lunch breaks. Spine still intact, no loose pages. Solid collection worth picking up.

I grabbed this for weekend grilling, expecting something basic for the price. It's actually more consistent than I thought, readings settle steady after a few seconds, though you'll wait longer than the box claims. The slim probe is a nice surprise, leaves barely a mark in chicken breasts. Out of the box it read 3 high, but a quick ice bath tweak fixed that. Not lightning quick, but for casual cooks it's a solid little workhorse. Four stars because it just slightly undershoots the instant-read dream.

This is a great little snack box. I use it to take veggies or fruit with us when we know it's going to be a long day. It's sturdy and small and easy to slip into a backpack or my handbag. It is also easy to wash up and it's adorable. However, the reason for one star off is the fact it is called a lunch box. There is no way I'd be able to fit my child's lunch in it. And there isn't room for a drink so I prefer to call it a snack box.
Bought this for day hikes and it's held up great. Comfortable straps, decent hydration sleeve. Perfect for beginners or casual hikers who don't need anything fancy. Can't beat the price.

Another dark Burke novel exploring the under belly of society. Burke, cautious as ever, has to find out why a potential client is killed over something in Burke's past. Again, Burke gets drawn down dark paths that people do not want to talk or think about: child-porn and the baby market. Where the villians mask themselves as upstanding citizens and criminals make justice. Intriguing characters. Gets you thinking hard about right, wrong and downright evil. --Doug Setter, author of One Less Victim

This bag is working out perfectly for my wife in her new job. She never removes it from the wheels as it takes a couple minutes to convert over and isn't really hard to shoulder carry with the wheels. Hint: Remove the rain cover from the cart and store it in the bag rather than where the company hides it. She wanted the red one, but I talked her into black and she is glad I did. The Red/Black combo tries to look stylish, but comes off too industrial in real life. The red bag by itself would be terrific, but not paired with the black rolling cart. Interior size is adequate as expected. Anything roomier would look like every other generic rolling case. This vertical bag stands out from the crowd, but remains professional. I thought the patent leather would be gaudy, but it's subdued by the patterns. Be a good husband and purchase this.
Nicely done. I would have appreciated an entry showing the density of renters in an insulae

I've had the Andis 21420 Pro-Animal clipper kit for just over eight months now, and it's honestly held up better than I expected. I groom two thick-coated Aussies at home, so these things see a lot of hair, dirt, and regular cleaning. The ceramic blade still cuts smoothly without pulling, and I haven't noticed any dullness even after dozens of full-body trims. The motor stays cool and quiet, which keeps my nervous dog way calmer than our old clippers did. The detachable blade system makes deep cleaning a breeze, and I've dropped the whole unit more than once on tile with zero damage. For the price, the build quality and long-term durability really stand out.

Hugh Howey nails world-building in even a compact piece like this. The way he builds the machine's perspective is what hooked me, watching it process emotions and surroundings felt unsettlingly real. I finished it in one sitting and immediately went back to reread certain passages. The pacing is tight without sacrificing depth. If you enjoy sci-fi that makes you question consciousness, grab this now. Wish it was longer but totally worth it.

I was really surprised by how well this puzzle held up after a week of regular use. It kept my dog occupied for hours without any frustrating spills or disassembly. Compared to the others I've tried, it actually feels more durable, no pieces fell apart as quickly. The design is clever and the challenge matches what I wanted. I love that it works alone, so I don't have to worry about constant supervision. It's a solid upgrade over basic toys, and it kept my pup entertained for days without breaking a sweat. Highly recommend if you're looking for something smart and safe!
One of my serious all-time favorite movies. Good every couple years. LOVE Jeff Bridges, and the goofy humor, makes me laugh every time.
Our little fixer carries this toolbox everywhere. The pieces are sturdy, the drill really spins, and it keeps him busy while I do real repairs.

Got this on sale for about eight bucks and honestly that's about what it's worth. The presentation is pretty polished and some of the segments are genuinely motivating, but the core message basically boils down to "stay positive and good things will come." That's fine, I guess, but after the first thirty minutes it gets repetitive. There's no real practical advice on HOW to shift your mindset when life throws curveballs at you. I've watched it twice and probably won't again. For the price of a couple coffees it's not a terrible pickup if you need a quick motivational boost, but I wouldn't pay full retail for it. Keeps skipping on my player too, which was annoying. Three stars feels right.

Don't let this little card game fool you, it's deceptively complex! While the game is complex, the rules and game play are straight-forward and after a few minutes you and your kids will have the hang of it. Imagine the card game War plus a little Magic; The Gathering and some Pokemon, and that's Brave Rat! The best part of this game is that it's a new game every time you play! Because the cards come in a small tin this is a perfect game for travel!
Arrived a day early in perfect condition. The packaging was so secure, no dings at all. I'm already hooked from the very first page.
Cheap material that falls apart. but hey what do you expect for $3 socks coming from China. Not happy. Also you can't tell what design is on them.

This book was so very excellent. To see what Dream has been through and she is able to push through is amazing along with Camryn and Cammile. These ladies are the images of what a strong woman can be. It just seems as life keeps throwing curve balls their way and the keep it moving...I hope their is a happy ending involved for all of them and they recognize their worth...can't wait for pt 2.
This is exactly what I have been looking for! Now I can easily measure out salt and pepper for recipes.

Got the paperback for under ten bucks and honestly that's a steal for how many hours of entertainment this thing packs. The small-town drama pulls you in immediately and the supernatural elements just amp everything up. Took me about two weeks to finish but never felt like a slog. Definitely worth picking up if you see it on sale.
Arrived quickly and the slipcover was in perfect condition with no dents. Popped in Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla right away and the picture quality blew me away. Great set overall.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing is solid. Fits my receiver, console, and soundbar with room to spare. Cable management actually works. Way better than the pricier stands I was looking at.

Watched about five episodes before giving up. The plot jumps around constantly and half the dialogue is just f-bombs strung together. After sticking with it hoping it'd improve, I realized it wasn't worth my time. Disappointing because the trailer looked promising.

This book had captured my attention as I had read one of her books from her series Love's Great Adventure and what appealed most was that this book was to be set in New Zealand and since I am from New Zealand, I enjoy books set here. The book starts over in America with Alicia discovering her cheating husband and then escaping over here to make a fresh start. She moves to Auckland where she has an IT job and moves next door to Tia, Hunter and Mick. What I liked about Alicia is that she is quite naive and this made her character funny and made her more relatable. As the book goes along we read as Hunter and Alicia start gaining great chemistry and though neither is officially ready for a relationship, they both seem to work great together and they get all hot and heavy. If you love Second Chance New Adult romances, then this is the book for you. The only thing I didn't like about this book was the language as being from New Zealand, I am used to how we do things here and our language. The author used phrases like Kia Ora as hello since the character next door was Maori and the word Pakeha and tribe. I know often it can be difficult for American writers to grasp the different cultural differences and language. Overall though it was only tiny things that unless you are from New Zealand, you wouldn't notice or pick up. Honestly, if you are on the lookout for a lovely second chance at happiness and romance story then By My Side is the book for you.

Love this short story! It makes you question who the boogeyman really is and who the bad guys really are. Heidi is Mortimer's first assignment as the Boogeyman. Mortimer is fresh on the job but Heidi doesn't make it easy for him. She is not scared and in fact they become fast friends that blooms into much more. Rules are broken and consenquences are to be had. This is a side of the Boogeyman that you won't see coming. This is a paranormal but with a twist. It is not all the bad that comes with being the Boogeyman, but the sweet that people see in each other.
This is perfect for what I needed!!! Love the ability of this little speaker! I can use USB to play my music, FM Radio or Bluetooth. I haven't found a speaker that is able to do so much.

Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with each piece nestled in a molded plastic tray, no rattling around or scratched components. First thing I noticed pulling it out was the weight, this doesn't feel like a budget kit. The rod sections thread together cleanly with zero wobble, and the handle has a real metal collar where it meets the rod instead of just bare plastic. Brushes included are decent quality, not the flimsy ones that shed bristles after one use. Only reason I'm holding back a star is the zippered case is pretty thin and the zipper feels like it might give out eventually. Tools themselves are solid though. Used it on my 9mm and.45 already, works exactly as it should. Good value overall.
Been wearing these for a few months now and they've held up surprisingly well through gym class and weekend play. Still look fresh after tons of washes, solid pick.
Serves it's purpose. Nice inside compartment to put cable and other things. Not Bulky, pretty much the same size as the speaker itself.
My dog loves these, but likes peanut butter flavor better. So he asked me to remove one star. Otherwise, two paws up!

I really like this food, it's good quality and keeps my cats satisfied. The texture is nice, but I do have to use a small utensil to get it out of the can. It does feel like a little extra step, but it makes sense for better nutrition. Chopping it a bit helps too, though sometimes it still feels frustrating. Overall, it's a solid pick and worth the effort. The taste is definitely better than generic brands. A few tweaks would be great, but so far it's a hit!

I grabbed these on a whim and honestly expected cheap plastic, but the sculpts have crisp detail and they stand up straight. Way better than the army men I grew up with. Perfect for tabletop skirmishes.

I really loved this documentary, it's packed with all those great film clips and interviews with Allen himself. The mix of old and new content makes it feel like a solid introduction to his legacy. I was surprised how much value I got for the price, especially considering the quality and depth. It's one of those gems you don't want to miss. Great storytelling and a lot of nostalgia. Worth every penny!

I got really impressed with how quickly I set up this new lock. The packaging was top-notch, everything arrived in perfect condition. It felt secure right away, and the design is sleek enough to blend into any bag style. Simple to use, no hassle at all. Highly recommend for anyone needing a quick setup solution.
Great to have to wear with black and navy wear almost every day

Sad that catholics in america, who have eaten so heartily at the protestant table, while bringing so many terrors into the country, would want just more "spin." Against a backdrop of their open border policy (Hart-Celler), the legacy of Kennedy's, the Jesuits inciting Latinos with "liberation theology" (anti-anglo-protestantism) to ensure newcomers will be filled with that peculiar hate as the border is opened for them---- such same old! And instead of a warning to them, and in the world where the Catholic murder of Christians in Serbia so recently (oh, is that just a big silly thing that should be put in "histoical context" also?) is known to so many--- one wonders. Do such people ever begin to take in anything at all of "the other?" Even as they moralize? Even as they harm? Even as they do not look at their own real history, but only seek to cover it?
This one didn't meet my expectations. Not worth the money. Avoid if possible.
Boring from start to finish. Fell asleep halfway through and didn't even bother rewinding. Total waste of money.

Cheap and works well. Bright enough to illuminate the path in front of you, or use one of the other options, if you prefer a flashing red or white light. It cycles through the options by clicking the power button, so turning it on and off is less than ideal. After much profound consideration, and consultation with philosophers and theologians, with scholars of law and jurists drawn from all regions of space and time (including several denizens of the Citadel of Ricks), I have decided to award this headlamp four stars.
Got through my deck refinishing without any trouble. Pretty solid sander overall.
This was my 1st story by this author. I loved the characters. The were so cute together This was a welcome break from the billionaire genre that I usually read.
Great found this sturdy strainer! Kept holding up after a few weeks of regular use without any issues. Looks neat and it really delivers on its promise. Perfect for keeping my kitchen organized.

Total waste of money. I expected genuine Clark's quality based on the listing, but what arrived is a cheap knockoff that doesn't even come close. The snake print looks painted on and started peeling after one wear. They claim leather but these are obviously synthetic and smell like plastic. The fit is weird too, tight across the toes but loose in the heel. Honestly the most uncomfortable sandals I've ever put on. You're better off spending twenty bucks at a discount store. Returning immediately.

This little gadget was my last attempt at painting a difficult to reach area over the stairs before paying a painter hundreds of dollars to finish what I started. Works great and easy to use, adjusts in more ways than similar ones which makes it very easy to angle any brush and get a straight line
Great package arrived fast and felt solid. Love how it looks on my shelf right away. Perfect for watching with friends!

The book held up well after a few weeks. It felt sturdy and didn't fall apart quickly, which is great for longer reading sessions. A bit more detail could've helped, but overall it's a solid pick for fans of the series.
Loved this show for its quality and strong acting. Super worth every penny at this price. Great deal!
Got this on sale and couldn't be happier. Solid build, cooks soups perfectly, and way cheaper than comparable brands.

I purchased these curtains to go up in my living room to help block some of the light the comes in through our large window. The curtains are of great quality material, I was actually pleasantly surprised by how nice they were. They're also made of a nice heavy fabric that does a great job of blocking out light.

Honestly expected way more based on the description. The sound is fine when they actually stay connected, but the range is maybe ten feet before they start cutting out. My old pair from a different brand was half the price and worked twice as well. They feel cheap in hand too, like they'll snap if I look at them wrong. The charging case is finicky and sometimes doesn't lock the buds in place so they don't charge at all. Took them on a run yesterday and the right one died twenty minutes in while the left kept going. Super frustrating. Wouldn't buy again and honestly wouldn't recommend to anyone either.
I was very disappointed with this purchase for my 5 year old. It is very small, hard to transform, and comes apart very easily. There are better Transformers out there.

Picked this up to keep in my junk drawer and honestly I'm impressed for the price. The beam is surprisingly bright for something this small, lights up my whole backyard when I take the dog out at night. Fits perfectly in a pocket or glove box without being noticeable. Battery life has been solid so far after a couple weeks of regular use. The different light modes come in handy more than I expected, especially the strobe during a recent power outage. Feels well put together, not cheap or flimsy like similar lights I've tried. Definitely grabbing a couple more to keep around the house and cars.
This one stayed in all my gear through harsh weather and tough hikes. Super durable, no issues even after weeks outdoors. Great value!
Great value for money! Super easy to set up and works perfectly.
a good story. a little too rushed, same elements, same good plot, but not enough transitioning as in earlier books. ending made me go???

The cover of the movie is a great portrayal of how the movie is going to go. I thoroughly enjoyed this Poe-twist story line. It gave some detail in the beginning of the movie (his anguish, tormented life), to keep you hooked to the end. As in his (Poe's) books; the fast-beating heart, time ticking away fervently, and turmoil to keep you always on the edge of your seat, was done well. At times (Poe) could come off as being too brash. But inevitably, you wound up feeling sorry for him. Each piece of the plot gently wound it's way to a complete story that would of course only end the Edgar Allen Poe way.
Great value for money! The squeegee makes cleaning quick and simple. Very satisfied with this purchase.
Good deal, cheaper then the sports stores. Nice ball to practice, with but since they are light, cant be of much use to determine ball flight only contact. Good for limited space.
Maybe fine for someone wanting a dull, rugged look, but I'd only suggest it for costume or industrial use.
My only complaint is that the straps were a bit long but very good quality; will buy this brand again.
I like the story very much. It felt almost like a real life story.

I would have liked to have much more interaction between Cade and Cecelia. This book is in the romance section but most of the book was about all the different ops going on in the story. And the note at the bottom of the book description about graphic sex? Maybe I'm just biased based on the other books I've read but the 3 scenes I remember (& I don't count one-liner remembering as a sex scene) were not exactly graphic in my opinion. All that being said, this was a good military romance read, with lots of twists, turns, violence, intrigue, etc. This is book 3 in the Deep Six Security series, so you may want to read the other two first. It is not necessary, in my opinion (I have not read them), but may help in understanding where the other characters are coming from in this story.

I really loved how this rice cooker handles everything at once, set it and forget it. The timer is super smart, and I appreciate that it works for both cooking rice and keeping my garden warm. What stood out was the durable build; it lasted longer than expected without any issues. The little touch of a modern design made it feel high-quality despite being compact. It's been a game-changer in my kitchen, saving me hours each week. A solid investment if you value convenience and performance.
Great color and feel, very soft and great price. I would recommend it.
Great experience with delivery, super tidy packaging. Love how they caught my earbuds right away!

Hobart makes the best wire period. A lot of novices out there trash Hobart, but Hobart has been making electrodes and wire for decades and it's used everywhere typically sold in drums in the industry. The only other wire that comes close is Washington Alloy? But for the home shop a 10-lb spool of Hobart ER70S-6 is perfect especially with a 75/25 gas mix

Picked this up as a companion to the base game and honestly for the price it's hard to beat. My daughter was already obsessed with the original so grabbing the expansion set was a no-brainer. The board quality matches what you'd expect, nice sturdy cards, and the artwork is solid. We've been using it for our weekly family game nights and it's been a huge hit. My only real gripe is that the rulebook could explain the new region mechanics a bit clearer, took us a few rounds to really figure out the scoring. Once we got past that though it's been smooth sailing. For under twenty bucks you're getting a decent amount of replay value. Definitely recommend if your kids already enjoy the first one.

My toddler loves the little hammer, it's soft enough that I don't worry about bonked heads, but still makes a satisfying thump. The balls pop through easily and he giggles every time. Simple design, no annoying flashing lights, and it actually holds his attention longer than I expected.

Easy to set up and easy to use. I watch my dog all day from work on my iPad or my iPhone. I have two and will be buying a 3rd. If you ever want to change locations just plug it in somewhere else in your house.

Wasn't sure what to expect for the price but these are great. I have two big dogs and this holds an entire 30lb bag of kibble with room to spare. The wheels are sturdy enough to roll across my laundry room floor even when it's full. Latches tight so no pests getting in. Way cheaper than similar containers at the pet store and honestly better quality. Grabbed a second one for birdseed.

Bought this for my sister's laptop. She lives in Florida, lots of afternoon lightning storms, and while I was visiting, I was using her computer to work in the afternoons. It's a nice, compact UPS, lots of outlets, smaller size so that it fits easily in a smaller combined bedroom/office, and no humming. That's been an issue with some UPS units I've owned, so it was a welcome discovery.

I've used this about six times now and the fabric is already pilling along the chin, plus a seam near the ear started fraying after a few washes. It still blocks wind okay, but the overall construction feels flimsier than I expected. For occasional use it's fine, just don't count on it holding up all season.

Was a little thrown off by the angled pins when I opened the package, but sure enough there's a note explaining it's intentional for shipping protection. Straightened them out and they seated perfectly. The knurled threading on these is what really sold me though, way easier to get a solid hand-tight seal than the smooth-bodied ones I've used before. No wobble, no signal issues. Used them on six runs and every single one tested clean. For the price, you'd be hard pressed to find better.

I bought this as an addition to another board I have. The board is entirely made of some sort of plastic while also providing a fishnet pattern for traction against your feet. Very sturdy with some stiff flex (the board has a curve) that makes it very nice to ride. For those wondering why they should buy this, one word, WATER. I live in Florida where it rains often so using my normal bamboo board is pretty much not a good idea. If it rains I'll just take this bad boy and worry not about any puddles. Also it's a great gift, so buy with confidence.

Eden Connor has this knack for pulling you into a world you'd never think to visit and making it feel like home. I'm not usually into romances that lean this gritty and offbeat, but the way she ties a hot dog stand, a traveling carnival, and a minor-league ballpark into one tight, passionate story is something else. The pacing is sharp, the banter feels real, and the chemistry hits hard without ever feeling forced. I'd hand this to anyone who thinks they've seen every romance trope, especially friends who love slow burns with a blue-collar vibe and characters who actually earn their happy ending. It's the kind of book you finish and immediately want to talk about.

The box came in really well, sharp edges and a neat seal made me feel good about getting it home. I was surprised how fast it arrived after ordering online. Right from the start, the story pulled me in with its quirky characters and smooth pacing. Even though some scenes felt a bit rushed, the writing kept up nicely. The first impression was positive, and I already found myself wanting more chapters. A solid pick if you love a mix of humor and suspense.

Cheap (not just inexpensive, but "looks like it came off a bargain-basement table piled high with other chintzy merchandise" cheap). NOT a turtleneck, more like a mockneck or a "funnel neck". Wish I'd read the description: the "turtleneck" is 1 1/4" tall, not a turtleneck by any stretch of the imagination. It gaps oddly at the sides so it looks like you're wearing it backward. I'm 5'2, 105 lbs, 32" bust, and it fits like it was painted on.
This wAs a great book and I can't wait to read the other books. It was very erotic and I was aroused the entire time I was reading it.
This book is super affordable and fun. The story keeps me entertained all week with my little sister. Great value for the price!

OMG! What an emotional rollercoaster this book was, I was taken in from the very start and couldn't put it down. Wow I loved Hector he is my new favorite hot bunch guy! This book proves once again that they just keep getting better.
Been using them for 4 years now. No complaints other than they are more expensive than I would prefer. But they do their job well and are more than convenient.
This thing lasted longer than expected. Feels solid now.
I really loved this headset. It fits snug and sounds solid. Perfect value for the price, definitely worth it.
For the cost, it does the job. Threads are a bit snug but it protects the glass fine.
Bought the complete set on Blu-ray over a year ago and the discs still play flawlessly despite weekly rewatching. Gorgeous costumes and drama that holds up beautifully.
Great value overall! The audio quality is solid and I enjoyed the detailed commentary on team strategies. Disliked the formatting a bit but worth it for the content.

I've had this on my Kindle for a few weeks now and the formatting held up fine, no glitches or scrambled pages after multiple rereads. The story's decent but the ambiguity around Alexandria's visions gets a bit repetitive. Still, it's a solid quick read that doesn't fall apart on repeat.

I was on the fence about dropping this much cash on a laptop, but after three weeks of heavy daily use I can honestly say it's worth every penny. The build quality is rock solid, the keyboard feels great, and the trackpad is still the best I've ever used. Battery life consistently pushes 10, 11 hours with my workload, which is mostly browser tabs, docs, and some light photo editing. Performance has been smooth with zero hiccups, even when I push it. I looked at cheaper Windows alternatives, but factoring in longevity and resale value, this thing is actually a smart deal. If you want something that just works and holds its value, it's a no-brainer.
Loved this film, it felt smooth on my screen and came in a solid package. The price was awesome compared to similar options. Got it fast without any issues. Would buy again!
surprised these are still around. Glad to have gotten it

My 3yearold got frustrated fast, the twist mechanism is too stiff for little hands, and the skinny crayons snap with barely any pressure. The plastic barrel also spins loose midstroke. I'd only suggest these for an older, very gentle kid who already has decent fine motor control.
Great knife. I wish the handle was just a bit longer. It's a Ka_Bar so no questions on the quality
I was a bit skeptical at first because I have never used this type of equipment before but this is fun! I highly recommend. %100 money back guarantee
This thing is top notch! The weight works perfectly for my big puppy who loves to slobber. Loved how easy it was to clean up. Definitely recommend!

I really enjoyed this pillow after reading the photos, it's nice and comfortable without feeling too soft. The texture is smooth and supportive, which made a big difference in my sleep setup. One thing that stood out was how well it holds its shape; even though it's bigger to ship, it fluffed up perfectly when I unwrapped it. It's a solid pick for anyone looking for something that balances comfort and structure. The only minor quibble is the packaging took longer than expected, but that didn't affect the quality at all. Overall, a great buy with nice results!
Great packaging, fast delivery. Love how it looks on me right away!

Benedict and Yeager describe a vast array of criminal patterns of dozens of current and former NFL players -- including some hideous and barbaric acts for which certain players suffered far too little (if any!) jail time. Because of the variety and brutality of the crimes described, more than the quality of the writing itself, the book is riveting reading; although there is a strongly sensationalistic, tabloid-style undercurrent to the whole piece which may repulse more careful readers. I finished this book with three outstanding impressions: 1) Far too little attention is given to the successful redemption of specific players who have stopped their criminal ways and become solid, admirable citizens (e.g., "Hollywood" Henderson or Cris Carter); 2) The writes make a convincing argument that the pampering which star players recieve in late childhood immunizes them (in their minds) from consequences for their actions; and 3) The authors clearly intended to be shocking at least as much for their own fame and fortune as for any noble social reform. After all, these criminal records are public, and were already well documented in the popular sports media. Serious football fans and sociologists alike should read this book to learn of a surprisingly sinister element that is liberally sprinkled among Sunday's heroes. But while reading, cast a healthy dose of skepticism at the intent of the writers.

The subject is the so-called Judgment of Paris--the blind tasting in which California wines defeated French wines and shocked the world. The film tells part of the story: the efforts of the individual--Steve Spurrier--who mounted the event and the Barrett family in Calistoga, the proprietors of Chateau Montelena. To add drama and conflict the film adds a father-son set-to among the Barretts and a love triangle with the younger Barrett, a female intern at the winery and a Latino employee, who would go on to run his own winery. Chateau Montelena won with its Chardonnay, but nothing is said (until the film's end) about Stag's Leap's victory in the Cabernet competition. Similarly, nothing is said about Chateau Montelena's winemaker, Mike Grgich, a then limited partner whose great 1973 Chardonnay enabled him to form a partnership with Austin Hills to form Grgich Hills, which is still known for the quality of its Chardonnay, while Chateau Montelena is now known as well for its superb Cabernet. Bottom line: this is a slightly schmaltzy take on a historically-significant subject, but one that still works cinematically. The wine country offers fantastic views, of course, and the Montelena scenes are shot at its stunning facility--a castle carved out of the side of the earth, forming, in effect, a man-made cave in Calistoga. The DVD includes interviews with the Barretts and a brief account of the winery and its standards and aspirations. All in all, this is a nice film. I also recommend the often-overlooked film, Year of the Comet, for wine lovers.

I wanted a compact rain shell for traveling; it is better to pack layers instead of carrying a big coat. This rain jacket is impenetrable to water when I run a sleeve under water, and it is completely dry afterwards. I have not used it in the rain yet. I bought the jacket "big" so it could be a shell and I could layer underneath it (with a packable down coat, fleece, and/or hoodie). On its own, the jacket looks comfortable and cut nicely, but not big. I am 5'6" 105 lbs and bought size medium for growing room (I like jackets loose anyway), but it already looks great as it is. This jacket has features I did not expect, including elastic around the bottom hem (length comes to mid pelvis) and the around the hood for cinching. There is a mesh flap in the back for breathability. These are great features. I noticed the hood is not oversized at all. Cinched up, I think I could probably keep my face dry. The tag on my jacket said it was $60, but I got it for less than $28; love the Amazon price! It also says it packs into itself, but I cannot figure out how to do this. I rolled it up and am using hair bands. I dropped the rating because the color represented is not the color I received, even though I like it. "Bright rose," instead of being a dark magenta as is shown, is just darker than hot pink. I'm not picky about my pinks though, so I'll wear it. This color would be cheerful on a wet day, but it will stand out in a crowd. I look forward to using this jacket a lot in the future!

Each chapter basically takes some invention you never thought twice about and shows why it changed everything. I've been reading a chapter every night before bed and keep finding myself bringing up random facts at work the next day. My only complaint is I wish it were longer. For the price of a fancy coffee you get something you'll actually remember and want to pass along to friends. Grab a copy, you won't regret it.

The writing itself is solid and the premise hooked me early, but the pacing felt uneven and the constant cliffhanger vibe got exhausting. It clearly sets up the next book instead of offering any real resolution, which left me frustrated. I might circle back if I'm in a different mood, but as a standalone read it just didn't work for me. Not bad, just incomplete.

I got a Kindle for Christmas and wanted to get a cute, but protective cover for it. I did a lot of research, and M-Edge seemed to get really high reviews, so I bought one. I got the fuchsia cover. It looks much different on my computer monitor than it does in person. On the monitor it looks more like a rose pink, but in reality it's a super bright, neon pink. I love pink, but I don't want it to stand out THAT much. It's really, really bright. I knew this cover wasn't leather (unfortunately), but once I touched it I was disappointed in the feel of it. Yes it is soft and smooth, but it looks and feels like plastic "Pleather." It really does have a bad over, but I was spoiled by leather in the past. No, it's not leather... but I knew that when I bought it, so I can't hold that against it. Overall, I think the design of this cover is fabulous. I love how it incorporates the E-Luminator (sold separately). It's quite a slick design. I love that I can store the E-Luminator right in the case. I also love the strap that keeps the book securely closed or open. It folds back on itself like a dream, and is very comfortable to hold either open or folded back. The inside has a nice microfiber suede-like lining that offers protection against scratches. It's a great case.. really great, if you don't mind the plastic cover. I am hoping that they will offer leather versions in the future, and more color choices.

The delivery arrived in pretty packaging, which was nice but a bit too big for what I got inside. The book itself is decent, just average sci-fi action with some solid characters. Overall a decent read if you're in the series, just don't expect anything extra special.

After 5 novels hasn't Mr. Moody learned that you just, can't, put, a comma, wherever you want to? And at times, well, a comma is needed. This could be credited to extreme sloppiness and mistakes that editors should notice right away. Like the fact that California is 9, not 8 hours behind Amsterdam. Consecutive chapter headings of Wednesday the 10th and Thursday the 12th (with a mention of Friday the 13th) make me wonder what happened to the 11th day of that month. Mr Baker is referred to as "Mrs" Baker. (What the hell do editors do these days?) And there are probably others that my quick reading or fading memory have missed. If you have a craving for some Chet Baker (who doesn't/shouldn't?) I would suggest de Valk's bio, or pre-order Gavin's. If you have mystery fix, just buy Elmore Leonard. I am not familiar with the other works of Mr Moody, I like the idea of jazz mysteries but heavily shy away from silly clichs and most of all bad writing. If anything I hope this will turn a few people on to the lovely music of Chet Baker.

My dogs were having some serious skin and coat issues, even on high-quality, grain-free dog food. I did an elimination diet with them and found out they're both sensitive to chicken.
